Their services include deposit accounts, loans, mortgages, investment products, and insurance. The bank is headquartered in Modena, Italy and operates through a network of branches throughout Italy.

name: Bureau Veritas SA
summary: Bureau Veritas SA provides laboratory testing, inspection, and certification services. It operates through six segments: Marine & Offshore; Agri-Food & Commodities; Industry; Buildings & Infrastructure; Certification; and Consumer Products. The company engages in inspecting, testing, auditing, and certifying the products, assets, and management systems of its clients related to regulatory or self-imposed standards, as well as the issuance of compliance reports. It also provides laboratory and on-site testing and analyses services to determine the characteristics of a product or material; inspection services, including visual inspections and verification of documents, and manufacturing supervision, as well as electronic, electrical, mechanical, and software testing; and certification services for management systems, products, and people. The company serves transportation and shipbuilding, oil and gas, construction and civil engineering, power and utilities, consumer products and retail, aeronautics and rail, metals and mining, agri-food, and automotive and chemicals industries, as well as government services. It operates in approximately 140 countries through a network of 1,600 offices and laboratories. Bureau Veritas SA was founded in 1828 and is based in Neuilly-sur-Seine, France.

name: DENALI THERAP.INC. DL-,01
summary: Denali Therapeutics Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing therapies for neurodegenerative diseases. They are developing a portfolio of product candidates engineered to cross the blood-brain barrier and treat diseases like Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, and ALS. The company is headquartered in South San Francisco, California.

name: ELECTROVAYA
summary: Electrovaya Inc. is a developer and manufacturer of lithium-ion batteries, battery systems, and battery-related products. They provide energy storage solutions for electric vehicles, energy storage systems, and other applications. The company is headquartered in Mississauga, Ontario, Canada.

name: SHIFT TECH.INC.A DL-,0001
summary: Shift Technologies, Inc. is an online car retailer that buys and sells used cars. They offer a technology-driven platform for buying, selling, and financing used vehicles. The company is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

name: THE GYM GROUP  LS -,01
summary: The Gym Group plc operates a chain of low-cost, no-frills gyms in the United Kingdom. The company provides affordable fitness facilities with a focus on accessibility and convenience. The Gym Group is headquartered in London, UK.

name: WANT WANT CH.HLDGS DL-,02
summary: Want Want China Holdings Ltd. is a food and beverage manufacturer in China. They produce a variety of snack foods, dairy products, beverages, and other food items. The company is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: JUMIA TECH. SP.ADR/2 O.N.
summary: Jumia Technologies AG is an e-commerce platform that operates in Africa, offering a marketplace for vendors and consumers to buy and sell goods and services. It provides logistics and payment infrastructure, enabling transactions in various categories such as electronics, fashion, home goods, and food. Jumia is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.

name: KAMUX OYJ
summary: Kamux Oyj is a Finnish company that specializes in the retail of used cars. The company operates through a network of showrooms and an online platform, offering a wide selection of vehicles and related services. Kamux is headquartered in Hämeenlinna, Finland.

name: KHIRON LIFE SCIENCES
summary: Khiron Life Sciences Corp. is a cannabis company focused on medical and consumer markets. The company cultivates and processes cannabis, and develops cannabis-based products for medical and consumer use. Khiron Life Sciences is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.

name: Teladoc Health, Inc.
summary: Teladoc Health, Inc. is a telehealth company that provides virtual healthcare services through a platform offering remote medical consultations, diagnoses, and treatment. The company connects patients with doctors via phone, video, and mobile app. Teladoc Health is headquartered in Purchase, New York.

name: IAC INTERACTIVEC.  DL-,01
summary: IAC/InterActiveCorp is a media and internet company that owns and operates various digital brands and businesses. The company's portfolio includes brands in categories such as dating, home services, and media. IAC is headquartered in New York, New York.

name: IAC Inc.
summary: IAC/InterActiveCorp is a media and internet company that owns and operates various digital brands and businesses. The company's portfolio includes brands in categories such as dating, home services, and media. IAC is headquartered in New York, New York.

name: Digital Turbine, Inc.
summary: Digital Turbine, Inc. provides mobile advertising and content delivery solutions. The company's platform connects mobile operators, device manufacturers, and advertisers, enabling targeted advertising and app distribution. Digital Turbine is headquartered in Austin, Texas.

name: Match Group, Inc.
summary: Match Group, Inc. owns and operates a portfolio of online dating brands, including Tinder, Match, PlentyOfFish, OkCupid, and Hinge. The company's platforms enable users to connect and find relationships. Match Group is headquartered in Dallas, Texas.

name: PERSH.SQUARE TONT.HLD. A
summary: Pershing Square Tontine Holdings, Ltd. was a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed to acquire a private company. Its goal was to merge with or acquire a target company to bring it public, but it did not complete a merger. The company was sponsored by Pershing Square Capital Management.

name: ACCOLADE, INC.
summary: Accolade, Inc. provides personalized healthcare solutions that help individuals navigate the healthcare system. The company's platform combines technology and human interaction to guide members through their healthcare journey. Accolade is headquartered in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania.

name: Pulmonx Corp.
summary: Pulmonx Corporation is a medical technology company that provides devices for the treatment of severe emphysema. The company's Zephyr Valve is a minimally invasive device used to improve breathing in patients with severe COPD. Pulmonx is headquartered in Redwood City, California.

name: Doralis Se
summary: Doralis SE, formerly known as Grammer Solar SE, focuses on renewable energy solutions, especially solar energy. The company's headquarters is in Germany. The company appears to be undergoing restructuring or changes in its business focus.

name: AGNC INV.CORP.  DL-,001
summary: AGNC Investment Corp. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in agency mortgage-backed securities (MBS). The company's objective is to provide attractive risk-adjusted returns to its stockholders through dividend distributions and capital appreciation. AGNC Investment Corp. is headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland.

name: OTIS WORLDWID.CORP DL-,01
summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation designs, manufactures, and services elevators, escalators, and moving walkways. The company's products are used in commercial, residential, and industrial buildings worldwide. Otis Worldwide is headquartered in Farmington, Connecticut.

name: RYMAN HOSPITALITY PROP.
summary: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) specializing in upscale convention center resorts and country lifestyle brands. The company owns a portfolio of hotels, entertainment assets, and media properties. Ryman Hospitality Properties is headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee.

name: NOW Inc.
summary: NOW Inc. distributes downstream energy and industrial products for petroleum refining, chemical processing, LNG terminals, power generation utilities, and industrial manufacturing operations in the United States, Canada, and internationally. The company offers its products under the DistributionNOW and DNOW brand names. It provides consumable maintenance, repair, and operating supplies; pipes, valves, fittings, flanges, gaskets, fasteners, electrical products, instrumentations, artificial lift, pumping solutions, valve actuation and modular process, and measurement and control equipment; and mill supplies, tools, safety supplies, and personal protective equipment, as well as applied products and applications, such as artificial lift systems, coatings, and miscellaneous expendable items. The company also offers original equipment manufacturer equipment, including pumps, generator sets, air and gas compressors, dryers, blowers, mixers, and valves; modular oil and gas tank battery solutions; and application systems, work processes, parts integration, optimization solutions, and after-sales support. In addition, it provides supply chain and materials management solutions that include procurement, inventory, and warehouse management, as well as solutions for logistics, point of issue technology, project management, business process, and performance metrics reporting. The company serves customers through a network of approximately 195 locations in the upstream, midstream, and downstream sectors of the energy industry, including drilling contractors, well servicing companies, independent and national oil and gas companies, midstream operators, and refineries, as well as petrochemical, chemical, utilities, and other downstream energy processors; and industrial and manufacturing companies. NOW Inc. was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Houston, Texas.

name: SBA COMMUNICAT. A  DL-,01
summary: SBA Communications Corporation is a leading independent owner and operator of wireless communications infrastructure including towers, buildings, rooftops, distributed antenna systems (DAS) and small cells. SBA generates revenue from two primary sources: site leasing and site development services, and is headquartered in Boca Raton, Florida. SBA's infrastructure supports wireless service providers in the United States, Canada, and internationally.

name: Tradeweb Markets, Inc. Class A
summary: Tradeweb Markets Inc. operates electronic marketplaces for the trading of fixed income, derivatives, and exchange-traded funds. The company provides pre-trade data and analytics, trade execution, and post-trade processing services and is headquartered in New York, NY. Tradeweb facilitates trading across a wide range of asset classes for institutional clients, dealers, and retail investors.

name: Pexip Holding ASA
summary: Pexip Holding ASA, a technology company that delivers a video-first meeting platform. Its platform simplifies video communication across borders, businesses, and platforms, enabling everyone to be seen, heard, and included. The company offers self-hosted and as-a-service deployment options for enterprise video conferencing built on the Pexip Infinity technology; and provides interoperability, including Microsoft Teams, Skype for Business, Google Hangouts Gateway interop, video system device registration, and a world-class meeting and calling service. The company has operations in the Asia Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Americas. Pexip Holding ASA was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: FACEDRIVEINC.
summary: FACEDRIVEINC. is an electric vehicle subscription service company providing access to EVs on a flexible basis. The company's business model revolves around offering a "mobility-as-a-service" solution, allowing customers to subscribe to EVs for a set period without long-term commitments.

name: XBiotech Inc.
summary: XBiotech Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, discovers, develops, and commercializes True Human monoclonal antibodies for treating various diseases. The company focuses on developing a pipeline of antibody therapies for treating oncology, inflammatory conditions, and infectious diseases. It is also developing interleukin-1 alpha therapies to treat variety of medical conditions, such as cancer, stroke, heart attack, or arthritis; and True Human COVID-19 therapy for treating the COVID-19 mutant virus. In addition, the company provides clinical trial contract research operations to conduct two large, double-blind placebo-controlled Phase II clinical studies. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas.

name: XUNLEI LTD SP.ADR CL.A/3
summary: Xunlei Limited is a China-based internet technology company operating a cloud acceleration platform. Xunlei's core product is its Xunlei Accelerator, which enables users to experience faster digital content transmission through intelligent networking and cloud computing technologies. The company is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.

name: XPHYTO THERAPEUTICS
summary: XPHYTO THERAPEUTICS is a bioscience accelerator focused on next-generation European cannabis companies specializing in formulation, clinical validation, and European distribution. XPhyto concentrates on approved cannabis products for German pharmacies, and the development of innovative drug delivery systems.

name: Nanoform Finland Oyj
summary: Nanoform Finland Oyj is a pharmaceutical nanotechnology company headquartered in Helsinki, Finland. The company focuses on nanoparticle medicine and aims to improve drug efficacy and patient outcomes through its proprietary technology. Nanoform offers services to pharmaceutical companies for drug particle engineering and formulation development.

name: GVS S.P.A.
summary: GVS S.p.A. develops and manufactures filtration solutions for healthcare, life sciences, automotive, and other industrial applications. Headquartered in Italy, the company provides filters, components, and systems for various liquid, air, and gas filtration needs. GVS's products are utilized in applications ranging from medical devices to cleanrooms and automotive systems.

name: PROGENITY INC.  DL-,001
summary: Progenity, Inc., based in San Diego, California, is a biotechnology company focused on developing and commercializing molecular testing products. They offer prenatal testing services and diagnostic tools for various medical conditions. The company's main focus is on women's health and reproductive health testing.

name: KANGJI MED.HLDS DL-,00001
summary: Kangji Medical Holdings Limited is a Chinese company that manufactures and sells minimally invasive surgical instruments and equipment. Their products are used in various surgical procedures and the company is headquartered in China.

name: SuperCom Ltd.
summary: SuperCom Ltd. provides digital identity, Internet of Things and connectivity, and cyber security products and solutions to governments, and private and public organizations worldwide. The company offers MAGNA, a common platform for ID registries, e-passports, biometric visas, automated fingerprint identification systems, digitized driver's licenses, and electronic voter registration and election management. Its PureRF suite is a solution based on RFID tag technology to identify, locate, track, monitor, count, and protect people and objects. The company's PureRF suite comprises PureRF tags, hands-free long-range RFID asset and vehicle tags, PureRF readers, PureRF activators, and PureRF initializers. It also provides house arrest monitoring systems, PureTag RF bracelets, PureCom RF base stations, GPS offender tracking systems, PureTrack smartphone device, PureBeacon, PureMonitor offender electronic monitoring software, inmate monitoring systems, DoorGuard tracking station, and personnel tags. In addition, the company offers domestic violence victim protection systems. Further, it provides connectivity products and solutions comprising AVIDITY WBSac, BOLSTER WBSn, BreezeULTRA P6000, Arena controller, and BreezeNET B. Additionally, the company offers Safend's Encryption Suite that protects the organization's sensitive data; and designs solutions for carrier Wi-Fi, enterprise connectivity, smart city, smart hospitality, connected campuses, and connected events. SuperCom Ltd. sells its systems and products through local representatives, subsidiaries, and distribution channels, as well as independent representatives and resellers. The company was formerly known as Vuance Ltd. and changed its name to SuperCom Ltd. in January 2013. SuperCom Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel.

name: CHRISTIAN HANSEN HL.DK 10
summary: CHRISTIAN HANSEN HL.DK 10 is likely a stock ticker denoting shares of Christian Hansen Holding A/S listed on the Dusseldorf Stock Exchange. Christian Hansen is a global bioscience company that develops natural ingredient solutions for the food, beverage, nutritional, pharmaceutical, and agricultural industries. Headquartered in Denmark, the company's products include cultures, enzymes, probiotics, and natural colors.

name: VIVOPOWER INTL.  DL -,012
summary: VIVOPOWER INTL. DL -,012 is likely a stock ticker denoting shares of Vivopower International PLC listed on the Dusseldorf Stock Exchange. Vivopower International PLC is a global solar power solutions company that develops, owns, and operates solar power projects. The company focuses on providing clean energy solutions for commercial and industrial customers.

name: MONGODB INC. CL.A
summary: MongoDB, Inc. provides a general purpose database platform globally. Its platform enables organizations to build and evolve sophisticated, relevant applications, across a broad range of use cases. The company is headquartered in New York, USA.

name: AKER CLEAN HYDRO.AS NOK 1
summary: Aker Clean Hydrogen AS, based in Lysaker, Norway, focuses on developing, building, owning, and operating clean hydrogen production facilities. The company aims to produce and distribute green and blue hydrogen to various sectors, contributing to decarbonization efforts. Their business model involves establishing hydrogen production plants and providing hydrogen solutions to industries and transportation.

name: Neles Oyj
summary: Neles Oyj provides flow control solutions and services worldwide. It offers control, on-off, emergency shutdown, butterfly, ball, globe, segment, and eccentric rotary plug valves; pneumatic, electric, and manual actuators; limit switches; and valve controllers, as well as valve parts. The company also provides valve repairs and maintenance, PID tuning and process control, and maintenance planning and lifecycle services. It offers its products to chemicals, energy, gas processing and LNG, industrial gas, marine, mining, metals and steel processing, pipeline, pulp, paper and bioproducts, refining, and water and wastewater industries. The company was formerly known as Metso Oyj. Neles Oyj was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Vantaa, Finland.

name: ILLIMITY BANK S.P.A. IN FORMA ABBREVIATA "ILLIMITY S.P.A."
summary: illimity Bank S.p.A. provides private banking, and investment and trading services in Italy. The company operates through Small Medium Enterprises (SME), Distressed Credit Investment & Servicing (DCIS), and Direct Banking & Digital Operations (DBDO) divisions. The SME division is involved in the financing of the supply chains of the operators of Italian chains and industrial districts through the activity of non-recourse purchasing and non-recourse of customers' trade receivables, as well as to businesses and acquisition activities. It also engages in the purchase of loans that are classified as unlikely-to-pay. The DCIS division is involved in the purchase of secured and unsecured corporate non-performing loans (NPLs) on primary and secondary markets; management of corporate NPL portfolios and underlying assets; and provision of financing services primarily in the form of senior financing to investors in distressed loans. The DBDO division offers digital banking services to retail and corporate clients. Its products include deposits and current accounts; and payment, digital CFO, and account aggregator services, as well as advice on mortgages, personal loans, and insurance for families. The company is headquartered in Milan, Italy.

name: ARCIMOTO INC.
summary: Arcimoto Inc. is an electric vehicle company that designs, develops, and manufactures three-wheeled electric vehicles. Their flagship vehicle, the Fun Utility Vehicle (FUV), is designed for everyday commuting and recreational use. The company is headquartered in Eugene, Oregon, USA.

name: DAVIDE CAMPARI-MIL.EO-,01
summary: Davide Campari-Milano N.V. is an Italian company involved in the branded beverage industry, marketing alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks in over 190 countries. Their portfolio includes brands like Campari, Aperol, Grand Marnier, and SKYY Vodka, among others. The company is headquartered in Sesto San Giovanni, Italy.

name: ATLASSIAN CORP. A DL -,10
summary: Atlassian Corporation Plc is a software company that develops products for software developers, project managers, and content management. Their products include Jira, Confluence, Trello, and Bitbucket, which are used by teams to collaborate, track progress, and manage workflows. Atlassian is headquartered in Sydney, Australia, with offices worldwide.

name: Kobe Bussan Co., Ltd.
summary: Kobe Bussan Co., Ltd. operates as a food retailer and wholesaler, primarily known for its discount store chain called "Gyomu Super." The company imports and distributes food products through its network of franchised and company-owned stores. Kobe Bussan is headquartered in Hyogo Prefecture, Japan.

name: CHUGOKU EL. PWR
summary: Chugoku Electric Power Company Incorporated is a Japanese electric utility company that generates, transmits, and distributes electricity to the Chugoku region of Japan. The company operates various power plants, including nuclear, thermal, and hydroelectric facilities. Chugoku Electric Power is headquartered in Hiroshima, Japan.

name: MS+AD INSUR.GRP HLDGS INC
summary: MS&AD Insurance Group Holdings, Inc. is a Japanese insurance holding company that operates in the property and casualty insurance, life insurance, and financial services sectors. The company's business model involves providing a range of insurance products and services to individuals and businesses worldwide. MS&AD Insurance Group is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: PERSOL HOLDINGS CO. LTD.

They aim to solve labor and employment issues across various industries, connecting individuals and organizations to foster growth. The company's headquarters are located in Tokyo, Japan.

summary: NAGOYA RAILROAD, based in Nagoya, Japan, operates a railway network in the Chubu region and provides related services such as bus transportation and real estate development. The company also owns and operates various leisure facilities, including hotels and amusement parks, contributing to regional development and tourism. It offers comprehensive transportation and leisure services in its operational area.

name: KEIHAN HOLDINGS CO. LTD.
summary: KEIHAN HOLDINGS CO., LTD. is a Japanese company primarily engaged in railway transportation, real estate, and leisure businesses. Headquartered in Osaka, Japan, Keihan operates railway lines in the Kansai region and develops residential and commercial properties along its railway network. Additionally, it manages various leisure facilities, including hotels and amusement parks, contributing to urban development and tourism.

name: MEDIPAL HOLDINGS CORP.
summary: MEDIPAL HOLDINGS CORPORATION, headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, is a major pharmaceutical wholesaler. They distribute prescription drugs, ethical pharmaceuticals, diagnostic reagents, and medical devices to hospitals, clinics, and pharmacies. Their business model is focused on efficiently delivering healthcare products and services to support the medical industry.

name: PALO ALTO NETWKS DL-,0001
summary: Palo Alto Networks is a global cybersecurity leader headquartered in Santa Clara, California, offering a comprehensive platform of security solutions. Their products include network security appliances and software, cloud security, endpoint protection, and threat intelligence services. The company serves enterprises, service providers, and government entities, helping them to prevent cyberattacks and secure their digital infrastructure.

name: B2Gold Corp.
summary: B2Gold Corp. operates as a gold producer with three operating mines in Mali, the Philippines, and Namibia. It operates the Fekola Mine in Mali, the Masbate Mine in the Philippines, and the Otjikoto Mine in Namibia. The company also has an 81% interest in the Kiaka Project in Burkina Faso. In addition, it has a portfolio of other evaluation and exploration assets in Mali, Burkina Faso, Namibia, Uzbekistan, and Finland. B2Gold Corp. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

name: CureVac N.V.
summary: CureVac N.V., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on developing various transformative medicines based on messenger ribonucleic acid (mRNA). It is developing prophylactic vaccines, such as mRNA-based vaccine candidate against COVID-19; CV7202, a prophylactic mRNA-based vaccine, which is in Phase 1 clinical trial for rabies virus glycoprotein; vaccine for lassa yellow fever; vaccine for respirational syncytial virus; CV7301, a second-generation lipid nanoparticle flu vaccine; and vaccines for rota, malaria, and universal influenza. The company also develops RNA-based cancer immunotherapies, including CV8102, which is in Phase 1 clinical trial for treating cutaneous melanoma and adenoidcystic carcinoma, as well as squamous cell cancer of skin, head, and neck; and CV9202 (BI 1361849), a self-adjuvanting mRNA vaccine that is in Phase 1 clinical trial for non-small cell lung cancer, as well as tumor associated antigens and shared neo-antigens. In addition, it is developing protein-based therapies for Cas9 gene-editing, ocular diseases, and lung respiratory diseases, as well as therapeutic antibodies. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in T√É¬ºbingen, Germany.

name: DAQO NEW ENERGY CRP.ADR 5
summary: Daqo New Energy Corp. is a leading manufacturer of high-purity polysilicon for the solar photovoltaic (PV) industry. Headquartered in Shihezi, Xinjiang, China, the company produces polysilicon used in solar cells and modules. They supply polysilicon to solar manufacturers worldwide.

name: ENTERA BIO IS-,0000769
summary: Entera Bio Ltd. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing orally delivered peptide and protein therapeutics. The company's lead product candidate is an oral formulation of parathyroid hormone (PTH) for the treatment of osteoporosis. Entera Bio is headquartered in Jerusalem, Israel.

name: QUALTR.INTL. A  DL-,0001
summary: Qualtrics International Inc., headquartered in Provo, Utah, is a software company that provides a cloud-based subscription platform for experience management (XM). The Qualtrics XM Platform enables organizations to collect, analyze, and act on feedback from customers, employees, and other stakeholders. Their solutions are used by businesses of all sizes to improve customer satisfaction, employee engagement, and brand reputation.

name: Elanco Animal Health, Inc.
summary: Elanco Animal Health Incorporated is a global animal health company that develops and markets products and services to improve animal health and protein production. Headquartered in Greenfield, Indiana, Elanco provides solutions for livestock and companion animals, including vaccines, parasiticides, and antibiotics. Their business focuses on enhancing animal well-being and supporting the food supply.

name: MEBUKI FINANCIAL GROUP
summary: MEBUKI FINANCIAL GROUP, INC. is a Japanese financial services group primarily operating in the banking sector. Headquartered in Mito, Japan, the group provides banking, leasing, and other financial services through its subsidiaries, mainly serving the Ibaraki and Fukushima prefectures. Its main subsidiaries include Joyo Bank and Ashikaga Bank.

name: ARIAKE JAPAN CO.LTD
summary: ARIAKE JAPAN CO., LTD. is a Japanese food manufacturer specializing in the production of natural seasonings and extracts for the food industry. Headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, Ariake provides customized flavor solutions to food processors, restaurants, and other food service companies. Their products are derived from animal and vegetable sources.

name: IYO BK LTD
summary: IYO Bank, Ltd. is a regional bank headquartered in Matsuyama, Ehime Prefecture, Japan. It provides a range of banking services to individuals and businesses, including deposits, loans, and investment products. The bank primarily serves the Ehime Prefecture and surrounding areas.

name: EZAKI GLICO
summary: EZAKI GLICO CO., LTD. is a Japanese food company known for its confectionery, including the popular Pocky and Pretz snacks. Based in Osaka, Japan, Glico also manufactures ice cream, dairy products, and nutritional foods. The company's business focuses on providing innovative and enjoyable food products.

name: KAGOME CO. LTD
summary: KAGOME CO., LTD. is a Japanese food and beverage company specializing in tomato-based products. Headquartered in Nagoya, Japan, Kagome manufactures and sells tomato juice, sauces, ketchup, and vegetable beverages. The company also engages in agricultural research and development related to tomatoes and other vegetables.

name: Kandenko Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kandenko Co.,Ltd. operates as a general infrastructure company in Japan. It engages in the facility installation works, electrical equipment sale, real estate rental and leasing, and electric power sale, as well as electrical, plumbing, and various other works. The company also undertakes works on electrical facilities and equipment inside various types of buildings and structures, building interiors, and control equipment; and environmental facilities and systems, and renovation works on air conditioning and sanitation systems, as well as water, heat, and disaster prevention systems. In addition, it is involved in the installation and maintenance of information and telecommunications systems; laying of optical fiber cables for telecommunications providers; installation of optical transmission equipment; and building and maintenance of transmission base stations for mobile communications and networks for cable TV and municipalities, as well as maintenance of telecommunications facilities for electric power providers. Further, the company undertakes the construction and maintenance of overhead power distribution lines facilities comprises power poles with power cables; and underground distribution lines facilities consisting of underground power cables. Additionally, it engages in the power stations and substations, underground and overhead transmission lines, and civil engineering works; designs and constructs power plants, as well as generates solar and wind power; and inspects and maintains nuclear power plant facilities and equipment. Kandenko Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: SHIP HEALTHCARE HLDG.INC.
summary: SHIP Healthcare Holdings, Inc. is a Japanese company providing comprehensive support services to the healthcare industry. Headquartered in Osaka, Japan, they offer medical equipment sales, facility management, and consulting services to hospitals and clinics. Their business focuses on improving healthcare efficiency and quality through integrated solutions.

name: GUNMA BK LTD
summary: Gunma Bank, Ltd. is a regional bank headquartered in Maebashi, Gunma Prefecture, Japan. The bank provides various banking services, including deposits, loans, and investment products, to individuals and businesses. It primarily serves the Gunma Prefecture and surrounding areas.

name: JINS HOLDINGS INC.
summary: JINS Holdings Inc. is a Japanese company that operates a chain of eyewear stores. Headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, JINS designs, manufactures, and sells eyeglasses and sunglasses. The company is known for its stylish and affordable eyewear options.

name: Zensho Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Zensho Holdings Co., Ltd. is a Japanese restaurant chain operator. Headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, it operates various restaurant brands, including Sukiya (beef bowl), Nakau (udon and donburi), and Coco's (family restaurant). The company's business model focuses on providing affordable and casual dining experiences.

name: NIPRO Corporation
summary: Nipro Corporation is a Japanese medical device manufacturer. Headquartered in Osaka, Japan, Nipro produces and distributes medical devices, pharmaceuticals, and diagnostic products. The company's main products include dialysis equipment, disposable medical devices, and pharmaceutical products for hospitals and clinics.

name: Ferroglobe PLC
summary: Ferroglobe PLC operates in the silicon and specialty metals industry in the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company offers silicone chemicals that are used in a range of applications, including personal care items, construction-related products, health care products, and electronics, as well as silicon metal for primary and secondary aluminum producers; silicomanganese, which is used as deoxidizing agent in the steel manufacturing process; and ferromanganese that is used as a deoxidizing, desulphurizing, and degassing agent in the removal of nitrogen and other harmful elements from steel. It also provides ferrosilicon products that are used to produce stainless steel, carbon steel, and various other steel alloys, as well as to manufacture electrodes and aluminum; calcium silicon, which is used in the deoxidation and desulfurization of liquid steel, and production of coatings for cast iron pipes, as well as in the welding process of powder metal and in pyrotechnics; nodularizers and inoculants, which are used in the production of iron; and silica fume, a by-product of the electrometallurgical process of silicon metal and ferrosilicon. In addition, the company operates quartz mines in Spain, South Africa, the United States, and Canada; and low-ash metallurgical coal mines in the United States, as well as holds interests in hydroelectric power plant in France. It serves silicone chemical, aluminum, and steel manufacturers; auto companies and their suppliers; ductile iron foundries; manufacturers of photovoltaic solar cells and computer chips; and concrete producers. The company was formerly known as VeloNewco Limited and changed its name to Ferroglobe PLC in December 2015. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom. Ferroglobe PLC is a subsidiary of Grupo Villar Mir, S.A.U.

name: HACHIJUNI BK
summary: Hachijuni Bank, Ltd. is a regional bank headquartered in Nagano, Japan. The bank provides a range of financial services, including deposits, loans, and investment products, to individuals and businesses. Its primary service area is Nagano Prefecture.

name: PARK24 CO. LTD
summary: PARK24 CO., LTD. is a Japanese company that operates parking lots and provides car-sharing services. Headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, the company manages parking facilities under the Times brand and offers car-sharing through its Times Car Share service. Their business model focuses on providing convenient mobility solutions.

name: MIRAIT HOLDINGS CORP.
summary: Mirait Holdings Corporation is a Japanese company specializing in telecommunications infrastructure construction and engineering. Based in Tokyo, Japan, they provide services for constructing and maintaining telecommunications networks, including mobile phone base stations and fiber-optic networks. The company supports the development of communication infrastructure.

name: MENICON CO.LTD

The company sells its products to original equipment manufacturers of light vehicles, which comprise passenger cars, sport-utility vehicles, vans, and light trucks; commercial vehicles, including medium-duty and heavy-duty trucks, and buses; and off-highway vehicles, such as agricultural and construction machinery, and marine applications, as well as to tier one vehicle systems suppliers and the aftermarket for light, commercial, and off-highway vehicles. name: CSX CORP.  DL 1
summary: CSX Corporation is a transportation company providing rail, intermodal and rail-to-truck transload services and solutions to a variety of markets, including agriculture, forest products, chemicals, metals and equipment. The company's rail network connects major population centers in 23 eastern states, the District of Columbia, and two Canadian provinces. CSX Corporation is headquartered in Jacksonville, Florida.

name: CHIASMA INC.DL-,01
summary: Chiasma Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing oral therapies to improve the lives of patients suffering from rare and serious chronic diseases. The company's lead product is an oral formulation of octreotide, a somatostatin analog. Chiasma Inc. is headquartered in Needham, Massachusetts.

name: Church & Dwight Co., Inc.
summary: CHURCH & DWIGHT CO. INC. develops, manufactures, and markets a range of household, personal care, and specialty products, including well-known brands like Arm & Hammer, Trojan, OxiClean, and Waterpik. The company sells its products through various channels, including supermarkets, drugstores, and online retailers. Church & Dwight Co. is headquartered in Ewing, New Jersey.

name: CLOROX CO.  DL 1
summary: CLOROX CO., THE manufactures and markets consumer and professional products, including cleaning and household products, personal care products, and food products. The company's well-known brands include Clorox bleach, Pine-Sol cleaner, Glad trash bags, Hidden Valley ranch dressing, and Burt's Bees personal care products. The Clorox Company is headquartered in Oakland, California.

name: SBF AG
summary: SBF AG is a German company that provides solutions for bus systems and electrical components for vehicles. The company develops, manufactures, and distributes electrical protection components and connection systems for the automotive industry and other sectors. SBF AG is headquartered in Eisenach, Germany.

name: Canadian National Railway Company
summary: CANADIAN NATIONAL RAILWAY CO. is a transportation company that operates a rail network spanning Canada and the central United States. The company provides transportation services for a wide range of goods, including grain, coal, petroleum, chemicals, and manufactured products. Canadian National Railway is headquartered in Montreal, Quebec, Canada.

name: ADAMIS PHARMACEUTIC.CORP.
summary: Adamis Pharmaceuticals Corporation is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing products primarily in the therapeutic areas of allergy and respiratory disease. The company's products include SYMJEPI (epinephrine) injection for the emergency treatment of allergic reactions. Adamis Pharmaceuticals is headquartered in San Diego, California.

name: Microbot Medical Inc.
summary: Microbot Medical Inc., a pre-clinical medical device company, researches, designs, and develops micro-robotics assisted medical technologies targeting the minimally invasive surgery space. The company, through its ViRob, TipCAT, and Liberty micro-robotic technologies, developing Self Cleaning Shunt for the treatment of hydrocephalus and normal pressure hydrocephalus; a disposable self-propelled locomotive device to treat capabilities within tubular lumens, such as the blood vessels, respiratory, and the urinary and GI tracts; a combination of a guidewire and microcatheter technologies that are used for endoluminal surgery; and maneuver guidewire, microcatheters, and over-the-wire devices within the body's vasculature. It has 42 issued/allowed patents and 23 patent applications pending worldwide. Microbot Medical Inc. was founded in 2010 and is based in Hingham, Massachusetts.

name: CYBERARK SOFTWARE  IS-,01
summary: CyberArk Software Ltd. is an information security company offering identity access management solutions. The company's software is used to protect privileged accounts and critical assets in organizations. CyberArk is headquartered in Petach Tikva, Israel.

name: JARDINE CYCLE+CARR. SD 1
summary: Jardine Cycle & Carriage Limited is a Singapore-based company that invests in market-leading businesses across Southeast Asia. The company's interests include automotive, financial services, heavy equipment, mining, infrastructure and other investments. Jardine Cycle & Carriage is headquartered in Singapore.

name: CYAN AG O.N.
summary: CYAN AG is a German company that provides IT security solutions. The company specializes in providing white-label security solutions to mobile network operators, virtual mobile network operators, and other companies. CYAN AG is headquartered in Munich, Germany.

name: Lumen Technologies, Inc.
summary: Lumen Technologies, formerly CenturyLink, is a telecommunications company providing communication, network, security, cloud solutions, and managed services to businesses and residential customers. The company operates a global network and serves customers across North America, Latin America, EMEA, and Asia Pacific. Lumen Technologies is headquartered in Monroe, Louisiana.

name: DECIPHERA PHARMAC. DL-,01
summary: Deciphera Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing important new medicines to improve the lives of people with cancer. The company is headquartered in Waltham, Massachusetts. Their primary focus is kinase inhibitor therapies.

name: CHINA NATL BUIL. M. H YC1
ORSTED A/S  DK 10
summary: Ørsted A/S develops, constructs, and operates offshore and onshore wind farms, solar farms, energy storage facilities, and bioenergy plants. They also provide energy products to commercial and residential customers. The company is headquartered in Fredericia, Denmark.

name: DUKE EN.CORP.  DL -,001
summary: Duke Energy Corporation is an energy company that provides electricity and natural gas to customers in the Southeast and Midwest. They operate through electric utilities and infrastructure and gas utilities and infrastructure segments. The company is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.

name: DAIICHI SANKYO CO. LTD
summary: Daiichi Sankyo Company, Limited is a global pharmaceutical company with Japanese origins that researches, develops, manufactures, and markets pharmaceutical products. The company focuses on innovative medicines in cardiovascular-metabolic diseases, cancer, and pain management. Daiichi Sankyo is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: DAMPSKIBSS. NORDEN  DK 1
summary: Dampskibsselskabet Norden A/S is a Danish shipping company that operates a fleet of dry cargo and tanker vessels. The company provides transportation services for various commodities, including grain, coal, iron ore, and oil products. Dampskibsselskabet Norden is headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark.

name: DATAGROUP SE
summary: DATAGROUP SE is a German IT service provider that offers a range of services, including IT consulting, infrastructure management, and software development. The company focuses on providing comprehensive IT solutions to medium-sized and large enterprises. DATAGROUP SE is headquartered in Pliezhausen, Germany.

name: Nel ASA
summary: Nel ASA, a hydrogen company, delivers various solutions to produce, store, and distribute hydrogen from renewable energy in Norway, the United States, Denmark, and South Korea. It operates in two segments, Nel Hydrogen Fueling and Nel Hydrogen Electrolyser. The company produces H2Station hydrogen fueling stations that provide fuel cell electric vehicles with the fast fueling and long range as conventional vehicles, including cars, buses, trucks, forklifts, and other applications. It also produces and installs electrolysers for hydrogen production. The company serves industry, energy, and gas companies. The company was formerly known as DiaGenic ASA and changed its name to Nel ASA in October 2014. Nel ASA was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.

name: Commerce Resources Corp.
summary: Commerce Resources Corp. acquires, explores, develops, and evaluates mineral resource properties in Canada. The company primarily explores for rare earth elements, as well as tantalum and niobium deposits. Its principal properties are the Eldor property comprising 244 claims that covers an area of approximately 11,475 hectares located in northern Quebec; and the Blue River Tantalum/Niobium property situated in British Columbia. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

name: CHINA MOLYBDENUM H YC-,20
summary: China Molybdenum Co., Ltd. is a Chinese mining company that explores, mines, and processes molybdenum, tungsten, copper, cobalt, niobium, and other minerals. The company operates mines and processing facilities in China and internationally. China Molybdenum is headquartered in Luoyang, China.

name: Monument Mining Ltd.
summary: Monument Mining Limited is a gold mining and exploration company focused on developing its Selinsing Gold Mine in Malaysia. The company also holds exploration properties in Malaysia and other regions. Monument Mining is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

name: DHT HLDGS INC.NEW DL -,01
summary: DHT Holdings, Inc. is an independent crude oil tanker company that owns and operates a fleet of very large crude carriers (VLCCs). The company's vessels transport crude oil on international routes. DHT Holdings is headquartered in Hamilton, Bermuda.

name: DRAX GROUP  LS-,1155172
summary: Drax Group plc is a British energy company that generates electricity from renewable sources, including biomass and hydro. The company operates the Drax Power Station, the largest decarbonisation project in Europe. Drax Group is headquartered in Selby, UK.

name: Daimler AG
summary: Daimler AG, together its subsidiaries, develops and manufactures passenger cars, trucks, vans, and buses in Germany and internationally. It operates through Mercedes-Benz Cars & Vans, Daimler Trucks and Buses, and Daimler Mobility segments. The Mercedes-Benz Cars segment offers premium and luxury vehicles of the Mercedes-Benz brand, including the Mercedes-AMG, Mercedes-Maybach, and Mercedes-EQ brands; small cars under the smart brand name; and ecosystem of Mercedes-Benz under the Mercedes me brand, as well as vans and related services under the Mercedes-Benz and Freightliner brands. Daimler Trucks and Buses segment offers its trucks and special vehicles under the Mercedes-Benz, Freightliner, Western Star, FUSO, and BharatBenz brands; and buses under the Mercedes-Benz, Setra, Thomas Built Buses, and FU brands, as well as bus chassis. The Daimler Mobility segment provides financing and leasing packages for end-customers and dealers; and automotive insurance brokerage, banking, investment, and fleet management services under the Athlon brand. It also sells vehicle related spare parts and accessories. Daimler AG was founded in 1886 and is headquartered in Stuttgart, Germany

name: DATA MODUL AG O.N.
summary: DATA MODUL AG is a German company that develops, manufactures, and distributes display solutions, embedded systems, and touch solutions. The company serves customers in various industries, including industrial automation, medical technology, and transportation. DATA MODUL AG is headquartered in Munich, Germany.

name: Danaher Corporation
summary: Danaher Corporation is a global science and technology innovator designing, manufacturing, and marketing professional, medical, industrial, and commercial products and services. They operate through various segments, including life sciences, diagnostics, environmental & applied solutions, and dental. The company is headquartered in Washington, D.C., USA.

name: DATRON AG INH.O.N.
summary: DATRON AG develops, manufactures, and distributes CNC milling machines, dental milling machines, dispensing systems, and laser machines for industrial applications. Their products are used in various industries, including electronics, medical technology, and automotive. The company is headquartered in Muehltal, Germany.

name: DASSAULT AVIATION INH.EO8
summary: Dassault Aviation S.A. designs, manufactures, and supports military aircraft, business jets, and space systems. The company's products include the Rafale fighter jet and the Falcon range of business jets. Dassault Aviation is headquartered in France.

name: DEUTSCHE BOERSE NA O.N.
summary: Deutsche Börse AG operates as an exchange organization and provides market infrastructure services. It operates trading platforms for securities, derivatives, energy, and other assets, as well as offering clearing, settlement, and custody services. The company is headquartered in Frankfurt, Germany.

name: DIEBOLD NIXDORF DL 1,25
summary: Diebold Nixdorf, Incorporated provides connected commerce solutions to financial institutions and retailers. They offer ATMs, self-service kiosks, point-of-sale systems, and related software and services. The company is headquartered in Hudson, Ohio, USA.

name: Deutsche Biotech Innovativ AG
summary: Deutsche Biotech Innovativ AG operates as a biotechnology company in Germany. The company develops Adrecizumab, a monoclonal adrenomedullin-specific antibody, which is in Phase II clinical trial as a therapy against septic shock to reduce sepsis mortality. It also develops various drugs for the prevention of breast cancer and tumor. The company was formerly known as Venetus Beteiligungen AG and changed its name to Deutsche Biotech Innovativ AG in August 2014. Deutsche Biotech Innovativ AG is based in Hennigsdorf, Germany.

name: DEUTSCHE BANK AG NA O.N.
summary: Deutsche Bank AG is a global banking and financial services company. It offers a wide range of products and services including investment banking, corporate banking, retail banking, and asset management. The company is headquartered in Frankfurt, Germany.

name: BANCO SANT.SPON.ADS/1 UTS
summary: Banco Santander (Brasil) S.A. provides various banking products and services to individuals, small and medium-sized enterprises, and corporate clients in Brazil. The company offers retail and commercial banking, investment banking, and asset management services. Banco Santander (Brasil) S.A. is headquartered in São Paulo, Brazil.

name: DESCARTES SYS GRP INC.
summary: Descartes Systems Group Inc. provides cloud-based logistics and supply chain management software solutions. The company's solutions help businesses improve efficiency, reduce costs, and enhance visibility across their supply chain operations. Descartes Systems Group Inc. is headquartered in Waterloo, Ontario, Canada.

name: DexCom, Inc.
summary: DexCom, Inc. develops, manufactures, and distributes continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) systems for people with diabetes. The company's CGM systems provide real-time glucose readings, helping patients and healthcare providers better manage diabetes. DexCom, Inc. is headquartered in San Diego, California.

name: DISCOVER FINL SRVCS DL-01
summary: Discover Financial Services is a digital banking and payment services company in the United States. The company offers credit cards, personal loans, student loans, and deposit accounts. Discover is headquartered in Riverwoods, Illinois.

name: DCC plc
summary: DCC plc provides sales, marketing, and support services worldwide. The company's DCC LPG segment sells and markets liquefied petroleum gas (LPG). This segment serves approximately 0.7 million customers. Its DCC Retail & Oil segment markets, sells, and retails transport and commercial fuels, heating oils, and related products and services; operates retail petrol stations; resells fuel cards; distributes oil; and provides inbound logistics, storage and filling, and outbound logistics services. This segment serves domestic, agricultural, commercial/industrial, forecourt, aviation, and marine customers. The company's DCC Healthcare segment offers products and services to healthcare providers, and health and beauty brand owners; outsourced contract manufacturing services to the health and beauty sector; nutrition products, such as vitamins and health supplements; beauty products; and product development, formulation, manufacturing, and packaging services. In addition, this segment procures and sells exempt medicinal products. Its DCC Technology segment distributes consumer technology products, including smart home products, gaming consoles, peripherals and software, wearable technology, and accessories; business and enterprise technology products, such as tablets, notebooks, and PCs; networking and security products; communication products comprising smartphones, feature phones, accessories, and unified communication products; and servers and storage products, audio visual products, printers, peripherals, cables and connectors, and consumables to retailers, resellers, and integrators. It also provides supply chain services. DCC plc was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland.

name: CLIMEON AB  B
summary: Climeon AB is a Swedish technology company that has developed a heat power technology. The technology converts low-temperature heat into electricity. Climeon is headquartered in Kista, Sweden.

name: DEERE CO.  DL 1
summary: Deere & Company is an American corporation that manufactures agricultural, construction, and forestry machinery, diesel engines, drivetrains (axles, transmissions, gearboxes) used in heavy equipment, and lawn care equipment. The company also provides financial services and is headquartered in Moline, Illinois.

name: JCDecaux SA
summary: JCDecaux SA engages in the outdoor advertising activities worldwide. The company operates through three segments: Street Furniture, Transport, and Billboard. The Street Furniture segment is involved in advertising in shopping malls; renting of street furniture; selling and renting of equipment; and the provision of cleaning, maintenance, and other activities. The Transport segment provides advertising services in public transport systems, such as airports, subways, buses, tramways, and trains. The Billboard segment is involved in advertising on private property, including traditional large format or back-light billboards; and the provision of neon-light billboards and advertising wraps. The company was founded in 1964 and is based in Neuilly-sur-Seine, France. JCDecaux SA is a subsidiary of JCDecaux Holding SAS.

name: DARDEN REST. INC.
summary: Darden Restaurants, Inc. is a full-service restaurant company that owns and operates brands such as Olive Garden, LongHorn Steakhouse, and Cheddar's Scratch Kitchen. The company has a portfolio of differentiated brands focused on providing exceptional dining experiences. Darden Restaurants is headquartered in Orlando, Florida.

name: DEFAMA AG
summary: DEFAMA AG is a German real estate company that invests in and manages retail properties, primarily local shopping centers and retail parks. They focus on properties in secondary locations with strong tenant mixes and long-term leases. DEFAMA AG aims to generate stable rental income and increase property value through active management.

name: Dentsu Group Inc.
summary: Dentsu Group Inc. operates in the advertising business in Japan and internationally. The company offers advertising services, including newspapers, magazines, radio, television, internet, sales promotions, movies, outdoors, transportation, and other advertising operations and advertising expressions. It is also involved in the consulting, development, and operation of information systems; sale of various software products; and provision of marketing and comprehensive network services. In addition, the company leases office buildings; and buys and sells real estate properties, as well as offers building and commission calculation services. Dentsu Group Inc. was founded in 1901 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Deutsche EuroShop AG
summary: DEUTSCHE EUROSHOP is a German real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in shopping centers across Europe. They acquire, develop, and manage shopping centers, focusing on properties with strong locations and high foot traffic. DEUTSCHE EUROSHOP aims to generate stable rental income and long-term value for its shareholders.

name: DBS GRP HLDGS  SD 1
summary: DBS Group Holdings Ltd is a leading financial services group in Asia, offering a range of services including consumer banking, wealth management, and institutional banking. Headquartered in Singapore, DBS operates across Asia, providing financial solutions to individuals, small businesses, and large corporations. Their services include loans, deposits, investments, and trade finance.

name: DELTICOM AG  NA O.N.
summary: DELTICOM AG operates online tire shops and offers a wide range of tires, wheels, and automotive accessories. The company sells its products through various online platforms and serves customers across Europe and beyond. Delticom is headquartered in Hanover, Germany.

name: DEUTZ AG O.N.
summary: DEUTZ AG is a German manufacturer of diesel and gas engines, primarily for off-highway applications such as construction equipment, agricultural machinery, and industrial vehicles. The company develops, produces, and distributes engines and offers related services, including maintenance and parts. DEUTZ AG is headquartered in Cologne, Germany.

name: NAUTILUS INC.
summary: Nautilus Inc. is a fitness equipment company that designs, develops, and markets a range of exercise equipment and related accessories. Their products include treadmills, ellipticals, bikes, and strength training equipment, sold under brands such as Bowflex, Schwinn, and Nautilus. The company is headquartered in Vancouver, Washington, USA.

name: DF DT.FORFAIT AG  NA O.N.
summary: DF Deutsche Forfait AG is a German financial services company that specializes in providing forfaiting and trade finance solutions. They purchase export receivables from companies, assuming the risk of non-payment. DF Deutsche Forfait AG is based in Cologne, Germany.

name: DFV DT.FAMIL.VERS. O.N.
summary: DFV Deutsche Familienversicherung AG is a German insurance company that offers a range of insurance products, including health, accident, and property insurance. The company focuses on providing simple and affordable insurance solutions through online channels. DFV Deutsche Familienversicherung is based in Frankfurt, Germany.

name: DE GREY MINING LTD.
summary: De Grey Mining Ltd is an Australian gold exploration and development company. The company's primary focus is the Mallina Gold Project in the Pilbara region of Western Australia. De Grey Mining is based in Perth, Australia.

name: DT.GRUNDST.AUKT.AG
summary: Deutsche Grundstücksauktionen AG is a German auction house specializing in the auctioning of real estate properties. They conduct auctions for various types of properties, including residential, commercial, and land. Deutsche Grundstücksauktionen AG is based in Berlin, Germany.

name: DTE EN. CO.
summary: DTE Energy Co. is a diversified energy company involved in the development and management of energy-related businesses. It provides electricity and natural gas services, with operations including utilities and energy trading. DTE Energy is headquartered in Detroit, Michigan.

name: Delivery Hero SE
summary: Delivery Hero SE offers online food ordering and delivery services. It operates approximately in 50 countries in Europe, the Middle East, North Africa, Asia, and the Americas. Delivery Hero SE has a strategic partnership agreement with Woowa Brothers Corp. to expand its Asian operations. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.

name: B&G Foods, Inc.
summary: B & G Foods, Inc. manufactures, sells, and distributes a portfolio of shelf-stable and frozen foods across the United States, Canada and Puerto Rico. Their products include frozen and canned vegetables, condiments, spices, and other specialty food items. B & G Foods is headquartered in Parsippany, New Jersey.

name: DIC Asset AG
summary: DIC Asset AG is one of Germany's leading listed property companies, and specialises in commercial real estate. With around 20 years of experience on the German real estate market, the company maintains a regional footprint on all major German markets through six branch offices, and has 169 assets with a combined market value of c. EUR 5.6 billion under management. DIC uses a hybrid business model to manage its business divisions Commercial Portfolio, Funds and Other Investments. Taking an active asset management approach, DIC employs its proprietary, integrated real estate management platform to raise capital appreciation potential in its business divisions and to boost its revenues. In its Commercial Portfolio division (EUR 1.7 billion in assets under management), DIC acts as proprietor and property asset holder, and thus generates revenues both from the management of the assets and through the value optimisation of its own real estate portfolio. The Funds division (EUR 1.6 billion in assets under management) generates its revenues by acting as issuer and manager of special real estate funds for institutional investors. Gathered in the business unit Other Investments (EUR 2.3 billion in assets under management) are strategic financial investments, the management of properties in which the company holds no equity stakes, equity investments in property developments and joint venture investments. DIC Asset AG has been included in the SDAX(R) segment of the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since June 2006. The Company's shares are also included in the EPRA index, which tracks the performance of the most important European real estate companies.

name: DIERIG HOLDING AG O.N.
summary: Dierig Holding AG is a German holding company with investments in various industries, including textiles, real estate, and renewable energy. The company's textile division produces and sells fabrics for clothing and home textiles. Dierig Holding AG is based in Augsburg, Germany.

name: DENKA CO., LTD.
summary: Denka Company Limited is a Japanese chemical company that manufactures and sells a wide range of chemical products, including elastomers, inorganic materials, and electronic materials. The company's products are used in various industries, such as automotive, construction, and electronics. Denka is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Viad Corp
summary: Viad Corp is a US-based company operating in the travel and recreation services industry. They provide hospitality, sightseeing tours, and event experiences in various destinations, including national parks and major cities. Viad Corp is headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, USA.

name: DIGITAL CHINA HLDGS HD-10
summary: Digital China Holdings Limited is an investment holding company engaged in the distribution of IT products and the provision of IT services in China. They offer a range of solutions, including cloud computing, data analytics, and enterprise resource planning. Digital China Holdings is based in Hong Kong.

name: CHRISTIAN DIOR INH.  EO 2
summary: Christian Dior SE is a French holding company that controls LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton, the world's largest luxury goods conglomerate. Through LVMH, Christian Dior is involved in the design, manufacture, and sale of a wide range of luxury products, including fashion, leather goods, perfumes, cosmetics, and wines and spirits. Christian Dior SE is headquartered in Paris, France.

name: KDDI CORP.
summary: KDDI Corp. is a Japanese telecommunications operator offering mobile, fixed-line, and internet services to both individual and corporate customers. Headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, KDDI also provides data centers, cloud services, and global ICT solutions. The company invests in research and development to enhance its network infrastructure and expand its service offerings.

name: D'Ieteren Group SA/NV
summary: D'Ieteren Group is a Belgian group that operates in three businesses: automotive distribution (D'Ieteren Automotive), automotive glass replacement (Belron), and real estate and investment activities (D'Ieteren Immo). The company's headquarter is located in Brussels, Belgium.

name: De La Rue plc
summary: De La Rue plc designs, manufactures, and delivers banknotes in the United Kingdom, the Middle East, Africa, Asia, the Americas, Rest of Europe, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Currency, Authentication, and Identity Solutions. The Currency segment offers printed banknotes, polymer substrates, and banknote security components. The Authentication segment provides range of physical and digital solutions, such as tax stamps and supporting software solutions, authentication labels, associated brand protection digital solutions, cheques and bank cards, and ID security components, including polycarbonate. The Identity Solutions provides passport, e-passport, national ID and eID, driving license, and voter registration schemes. The company also provides trading and non-trading, as well as insurance services. It serves the governments, central banks, and commercial organizations. The company was founded in 1813 and is headquartered in Basingstoke, the United Kingdom.

name: DOWA HOLDINGS CO., LTD.
summary: DOWA Holdings Co., Ltd. is a Japanese company engaged in a broad range of businesses, including environmental management and recycling, resource development, metal processing, and electronic materials. The company provides services such as waste treatment and recycling of electronic devices, manufactures copper and electronic materials, and explores and develops mineral resources. DOWA Holdings is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: dynaCERT Inc.
summary: dynaCERT Inc. engages in the design, engineering, manufacture, testing, distribution, and installation of transportable hydrogen generator aftermarket products in North America and internationally. Its patented and patent-pending retrofit product provides performance enhancements by injecting hydrogen and oxygen into the air intake manifold resulting in fuel efficiency and reduced carbon emissions. The company offers HydraGen, an aftermarket unit that produces hydrogen and oxygen on demand and is designed for on-road applications with class 6-8 engines. Its products have application in various market segments for trucks, reefer trailers, buses, heavy construction, mining equipment, electrical power generators, marine, and locomotive. The company was formerly known as Dynamic Fuel Systems, Inc. and changed its name to DynaCERT Inc. in January 2013. DynaCERT Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.

name: DERMAPHARM HLDG INH O.N.
summary: Dermapharm Holding SE is a German pharmaceutical company focused on the development, production, and distribution of branded pharmaceuticals, other healthcare products and aesthetic dermatology products. The company operates through two business segments: Branded Pharmaceuticals and "Other Healthcare Products". Dermapharm is headquartered in Grünwald, Germany.

name: DEMIRE DT.MTS.RE AG
summary: DEMIRE Deutsche Mittelstand Real Estate AG is a German real estate company that focuses on acquiring and managing commercial properties in secondary locations in Germany. The company invests primarily in office, retail, and logistics properties. DEMIRE aims to generate stable rental income and increase property values through active asset management.

name: Downer EDI Limited
summary: Downer EDI Limited is an Australian provider of engineering, construction, and maintenance services. It operates in sectors such as transport, utilities, and resources. The company is headquartered in North Sydney, Australia.

name: Denso Corp.
summary: DENSO Corporation is a global automotive components manufacturer and supplier. The company develops and produces a wide range of automotive parts, including powertrain systems, thermal systems, mobility systems, and electronic systems. DENSO's products are used by major automotive manufacturers worldwide, and the company is headquartered in Kariya, Aichi, Japan.

name: DAI NIPPON PRINTG
summary: DAI NIPPON PRINTING CO., LTD. is a Japanese company that provides printing and information solutions. The company's business segments include information communication, lifestyle and industrial supplies, and electronics. DAI NIPPON PRINTING offers products such as publications, commercial printing, packaging materials, decorative materials, and display components, and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Equinor ASA
summary: Equinor ASA, an energy company, engages in the exploration, production, transportation, refining, and marketing of petroleum and petroleum-derived products, and other forms of energy, as well as other businesses in Norway and internationally. The company operates in five segments: Exploration Norway; Exploration & Production (E&P) International; E&P USA; Marketing, Midstream & Processing; and Other. It also transports, processes, manufactures, markets, and trades in oil and gas commodities, such as crude and condensate products, gas liquids, natural gas, and liquefied natural gas; markets and trades in electricity and emission rights; and operates refineries, terminals and processing, and power plants; and develops low carbon solutions for oil and gas. In addition, the company develops wind, and carbon capture and storage projects, as well as offers other renewable energy. As of December 31, 2020, it had proved oil and gas reserves of 5,260 million barrels of oil equivalent. Equinor ASA has a strategic collaboration agreement with SINTEF. The company was formerly known as Statoil ASA and changed its name to Equinor ASA in May 2018. Equinor ASA was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Stavanger, Norway.

name: Equinor ASA
summary: Equinor ASA, an energy company, engages in the exploration, production, transportation, refining, and marketing of petroleum and petroleum-derived products, and other forms of energy, as well as other businesses in Norway and internationally. The company operates in five segments: Exploration Norway; Exploration & Production (E&P) International; E&P USA; Marketing, Midstream & Processing; and Other. It also transports, processes, manufactures, markets, and trades in oil and gas commodities, such as crude and condensate products, gas liquids, natural gas, and liquefied natural gas; markets and trades in electricity and emission rights; and operates refineries, terminals and processing, and power plants; and develops low carbon solutions for oil and gas. In addition, the company develops wind, and carbon capture and storage projects, as well as offers other renewable energy. As of December 31, 2020, it had proved oil and gas reserves of 5,260 million barrels of oil equivalent. Equinor ASA has a strategic collaboration agreement with SINTEF. The company was formerly known as Statoil ASA and changed its name to Equinor ASA in May 2018. Equinor ASA was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Stavanger, Norway.

name: DOMINION ENERGY INC.
summary: Dominion Energy, Inc. is an energy company that produces and transports energy in the United States. The company's portfolio includes electric generation, natural gas transmission and distribution, and renewable energy assets. Dominion Energy serves approximately 7 million customers in 16 states and is headquartered in Richmond, Virginia.

name: DO + CO AG
summary: DO + CO AG is an Austrian company specializing in airline catering, international event catering, and restaurants, bars, and lounges. The company provides catering services to airlines, operates restaurants and bars at airports, and caters for large-scale events. DO + CO AG is headquartered in Vienna, Austria.

name: Dorstener Maschinenfabrik AG
