In addition, it offers advice and customized solutions in the areas of financial management, portfolio management, and insurance for business customers; PRoMMiSe, a software that helps banks with the analysis and reporting of securitized or collateralized loan portfolios; Software as a Service for banks and housing companies; and property valuation services, as well as supports issuers with the provision of information technology and a range of services. Further, it develops and operates software solutions for the sale and management of insurance products; operates SMART INSUR, a web-based B2B platform for advice, comparison of tariffs, and the administration of insurance policies; and provides support services to small and medium-sized financial product distributors in relation to the brokerage of insurance policies. The company is headquartered in L√É¬ºbeck, Germany.

name: HYUNDAI MOT.0,5N.VTG GDRS
summary: Hyundai Motor Company is a South Korean multinational automotive manufacturer that produces a wide range of vehicles, including passenger cars, SUVs, and commercial vehicles. The company also invests in future mobility solutions such as electric vehicles and autonomous driving technology. Hyundai Motor Company is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.

name: Heiwa Real Estate Co., Ltd.
summary: Heiwa Real Estate Co., Ltd. is a Japanese real estate company that primarily focuses on the leasing and management of office buildings and commercial facilities, particularly in the Tokyo metropolitan area. The company is also involved in the development of new properties and the renovation of existing buildings. Heiwa Real Estate is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: HITACHI ZOSEN CORP.
summary: Hitachi Zosen Corporation is a Japanese industrial and engineering company that manufactures a range of products, including environmental systems, industrial machinery, infrastructure-related equipment, and precision machinery. The company also engages in shipbuilding and plant construction. Hitachi Zosen is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

name: Italgas S.p.A.
summary: Italgas S.p.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the distribution of natural gas in Italy. It is involved in the transportation of gas through local pipeline networks from the delivery points at the reduction and measurement stations interconnected with the transport networks to the points of final delivery to households, enterprises, etc. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated a distribution network of 70,502 kilometers that served 1,744 operating municipalities. It also engages in metering activities; and distributes and sells water. The company was founded in 1837 and is based in Milan, Italy.

name: IG GROUP HLDGS PLC
summary: IG GROUP HLDGS PLC is a global leader in online trading and investments, providing access to opportunities in financial markets. The company offers a range of trading products and platforms, including contracts for difference (CFDs), spread betting, and share dealing. IG Group is headquartered in London, United Kingdom.

name: IRON MOUNTAIN (NEW)DL-,01
summary: Iron Mountain Incorporated is a global information management services company. The company provides solutions for records management, data protection, secure shredding, and data centers. Iron Mountain is headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts.

name: INCITEC PIVOT
summary: INCITEC PIVOT is an Australian-based global manufacturer of fertilizers, explosives, and chemicals. The company operates through two segments: Dyno Nobel, which manufactures and supplies explosives, and Incitec Pivot Fertilisers, which produces and distributes fertilizers. Incitec Pivot is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.

name: Precigen Inc
summary: PRECIGEN INC. is a biopharmaceutical company pioneering a new class of therapeutics known as AdenoVerse gene therapy. They develop precision gene and cell therapies using their proprietary technology platforms. PreCigen Inc. is headquartered in Germantown, Maryland.

name: Ipsen S.A.
summary: Ipsen S.A. operates as a biopharmaceutical company worldwide. The company provides drugs in the areas of oncology, neuroscience, gastroenterology, cognitive disorders, and rare diseases. It offers Somatuline for neuroendocrine tumors and acromegaly; Decapeptyl for metastatic prostate cancer, uterine fibroids, precocious puberty, endometriosis, female sterility, and early stage breast cancer; Cabometyx for renal cell and second-line hepatocellular carcinoma; Onivyde for second-line metastatic pancreatic cancer; and Dysport for motor muscular disorders and medical aesthetics. The company also provides NutropinAq for growth failure in children due to growth hormone (GH) deficiency, turner syndrome, and chronic renal failure, as well as GH deficiency in adults; and Increlex for growth failure in children and adolescents. In addition, it offers Smecta for chronic and acute diarrhea, and pain associated with functional bowel diseases; Forlax for constipation; Fortrans/Eziclen for bowel cleansing prior to endoscopy, X-ray examination, and colonic surgery; and Tanakan for cognitive disorders in adults, vertigo of vestibular origin and vestibular rehabilitation, and tinnitus. Further, the company provides Xermelo for the carcinoid syndrome; Cometriq for medullary thyroid cancer; Smebiocta/SmectaFlora Comfort, a food supplement; SmectaGas, a medical device used in the symptomatic treatment of gas-related gastrointestinal disorders and relief of gas-related symptoms; and Etiasa for inflammatory bowel diseases. Additionally, it offers other consumer healthcare products in the gastro-intestinal area, including Buscopan, Clin4000, Prontalgine, Suppositoria Glycerini, Mucothiol, Floractin, and Mucodyne. The company has various agreements with Debiopharm, Exelixis, Galderma, Blueprint Medicines, TerSera Therapeutics, Rhythm Pharmaceuticals, Teijin, Braintree Laboratories, Ethypharm, and Schwabe. Ipsen S.A. was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Boulogne-Billancourt, France. Ipsen S.A. is a subsidiary of Mayroy SA.

name: Sims Ltd
summary: SIMS LTD. DEF. is a global leader in metal recycling. The company collects, processes, and sells ferrous and non-ferrous recycled metals. Sims Limited is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.

name: IROBOT CORP.  DL-,01
summary: iRobot Corporation designs, builds, and sells robots for the home. The company's product line includes robotic vacuum cleaners (Roomba) and robotic mops (Braava). iRobot is headquartered in Bedford, Massachusetts.

name: INPEX CORP.
summary: INPEX CORPORATION explores, develops, and produces oil and natural gas worldwide, with its headquarters in Tokyo, Japan. The company's activities include exploration, development, and production of crude oil, natural gas, and other mineral resources. INPEX also engages in LNG business and pipeline operations.

name: Arbutus Biopharma Corporation
summary: Arbutus Biopharma Corporation is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapeutics for chronic hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection, with headquarters in Warminster, Pennsylvania. The company's pipeline includes RNA interference (RNAi) therapeutics and other approaches to target HBV. Arbutus aims to provide a functional cure for HBV infection.

name: Iamgold Corporation
summary: IAMGOLD Corporation is a mid-tier gold mining company that explores for, develops, and operates mining properties. It has operating mines in North America, South America and West Africa and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada. The company's business model focuses on responsible mining practices.

name: IBERDROLA INH.  EO -,75
summary: Iberdrola, S.A. is a multinational electric utility company engaged in the production, distribution, and marketing of electricity. The company operates in numerous countries, including Spain, the United Kingdom, the United States, Brazil, and Mexico and its headquarters is in Bilbao, Spain. Iberdrola focuses on renewable energy sources and sustainable energy solutions.

name: INTL BUS. MACH.  DL-,20
summary: International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) is a multinational technology company that provides a range of hardware, software, and services. The company is involved in cloud computing, artificial intelligence, consulting, and research and is headquartered in Armonk, New York. IBM serves clients globally across various industries.

name: IBU-TEC ADV.MATER. INH.ON
summary: IBU-tec advanced materials AG is a German technology and engineering company. The company develops and produces innovative materials and technologies for various industries, including the battery, chemical, and automotive industries and is headquartered in Weimar, Germany. IBU-tec focuses on thermal process engineering and specialty materials.

name: INTERCONTINENTAL EXCH.INC
summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (ICE) operates global exchanges, clearing houses, and data services. The company provides trading and clearing services for a variety of financial and commodity products and is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia. ICE also provides data and listings services.

name: InCity Immobilien AG
summary: InCity Immobilien AG is a German real estate company focused on the acquisition, development, and management of commercial properties. The company primarily invests in office and retail properties in major German cities and is headquartered in Munich, Germany. InCity Immobilien aims to create value through active asset management and strategic property development.

name: Orica Limited
summary: Orica Limited is an Australian-based company that provides mining and infrastructure solutions. It is one of the world’s largest suppliers of commercial explosives and blasting systems to the mining and infrastructure industries. The company's headquarters are in Melbourne, Australia.

name: ICICI BANK LTD ADR/2
summary: ICICI Bank Limited is an Indian multinational banking and financial services company. The bank offers a wide range of banking products and financial services to corporate and retail customers through a variety of delivery channels and is headquartered in Mumbai, India. ICICI Bank has operations in India and overseas.

name: IND.+COMM.BK CHINA H YC 1
summary: Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (ICBC) is a Chinese multinational banking company. It provides a range of financial products and services, including retail and commercial banking, investment banking, and asset management. ICBC is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: CELL IMPACT AB B
summary: Cell Impact AB develops and produces bipolar plates for fuel cells and electrolyzers. The company utilizes a proprietary forming technology to manufacture these plates, which are crucial components in hydrogen energy systems. Cell Impact AB is headquartered in Karlskoga, Sweden.

name: INVISIO AB
summary: Invisio AB develops and sells advanced communication systems for professional users. Their products include headsets and control units that enable clear communication in challenging environments. Invisio AB is headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark.

name: Incyte Corporation
summary: Incyte Corporation is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development, and commercialization of novel therapeutics, with headquarters in Wilmington, Delaware. The company's lead product, Jakafi (ruxolitinib), is a JAK inhibitor approved for myelofibrosis, polycythemia vera, and acute graft-versus-host disease. Incyte's research and development efforts are focused on hematology/oncology, inflammation, and autoimmunity.

name: INDRA SISTEMAS INH.EO 0,2
summary: Indra Sistemas S.A. is a Spanish information technology and defense systems company headquartered in Alcobendas, Madrid. It provides a range of technology services, including consulting, IT solutions, and defense systems. The company operates in various sectors such as transportation, energy, financial services, public administration, and defense and security.

name: Imdex Limited
summary: Imdex Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides mining equipment, technology, and services for the minerals industry in the Asia-Pacific, Africa, Europe, the Americas, and internationally. It offers drilling fluids, equipment, technologies, and software used to optimize drilling programs, as well as solutions for the horizontal directional drilling, water-well, and civil construction sectors under the AMC and REFLEX brands. The company also provides software, mining technology, drilling optimization, downhole navigation, structural geology, in-field geoanalysis, and driller operable geophysics solutions. It primarily serves drilling contractors and resource companies. The company was formerly known as Pilbara Gold NL and changed its name to Imdex Limited in July 1985. Imdex Limited was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Balcatta, Australia.

name: Biogen Inc.
summary: Biogen Inc. discovers, develops, manufactures, and delivers therapies for treating neurological and neurodegenerative diseases worldwide. The company offers TECFIDERA, VUMERITY, AVONEX, PLEGRIDY, TYSABRI, and FAMPYRA for multiple sclerosis (MS); SPINRAZA for spinal muscular atrophy; and FUMADERM to treat plaque psoriasis. It also provides BENEPALI, an etanercept biosimilar referencing ENBREL; IMRALDI, an adalimumab biosimilar referencing HUMIRA; and FLIXABI, an infliximab biosimilar referencing REMICADE. In addition, the company offers RITUXAN for treating non-Hodgkin's lymphoma, chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL), rheumatoid arthritis, two forms of ANCA-associated vasculitis, and pemphigus vulgaris; RITUXAN HYCELA for non-Hodgkin's lymphoma and CLL; GAZYVA to treat CLL and follicular lymphoma; and OCREVUS for treating relapsing MS and primary progressive MS; and other anti-CD20 therapies. Further, it develops BIIB061, BIIB091, and BIIB107 for MS and neuroimmunology; Aducanumab, BAN2401, BIIB092, BIIB076, and BIIB080 to treat Alzheimer's disease and dementia; BIIB067, BIIB078, BIIB105, BIIB100, and BIIB110 to treat neuromuscular disorders; BIIB124, BIIB094, BIIB118, BIIB101, and BIIB122 for treating Parkinson's disease and movement disorders; BIIB111 and BIIB112 to treat ophthalmology related diseases; BIIB125 and BIIB104 for treating neuropsychiatry; Dapirolizumab pegol and BIIB059 to treat immunology related diseases; BIIB093 and TMS-007 to treat acute neurology; BIIB074 and BIIB095 for neuropathic pain; and SB11 and SB15 biosimilars, which are under various stages of development. The company offers products through its sales force and marketing groups. It has collaboration and license agreements with Acorda Therapeutics, Inc.; Alkermes Pharma Ireland Limited; Bristol-Myers Squibb Company; Eisai Co., Ltd.; Genentech, Inc.; Neurimmune SubOne AG; and Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Cambridge, Massachusetts.

name: INDUSTRIV. A FR.
summary: Industrivarden AB is a Swedish investment company that manages a portfolio of listed companies, primarily in the Nordic region. The company aims to generate long-term value growth through active ownership in its portfolio companies. Industrivarden is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

name: IGO LTD.
summary: IGO Ltd is an Australian mining company focused on discovering, developing and operating high-quality metals that are critical to clean energy. The company's headquarter is located in Perth, Australia. IGO operates across Western Australia, holding interests in nickel, lithium, copper, and cobalt.

name: Informa plc
summary: Informa plc operates as a business-to-business events, academic publishing, and information services company worldwide. It operates through five divisions: Informa Connect, Informa Intelligence, Informa Markets, Informa Tech, and Taylor & Francis. The Informa Connect division provides content-driven events and digital platforms that allow professionals to meet, connect, learn, and share knowledge. This division operates events in finance, biotech, and pharma, as well as in other specialist markets. The Informa Intelligence division offers digital intelligence and data-based products, consultancy, and research services in the areas of pharma, financial, maritime, and asset intelligence, as well as Barbour ABI, a provider of construction market intelligence and building project leads for built environment specialists. The Informa Markets division creates platforms for international markets, which provide brands, exhibitions, specialist digital content, and data solutions to customers operating in specialist markets to meet and trade. The Informa Tech division offers research, media, training, and events that inform, educate, and connect businesses and professionals working in technology. The Taylor & Francis division publishes books for upper level university students, researchers, and academic institutions in a range of specialist subjects; and journals under imprints such as Routledge, Taylor & Francis, and Cogent OA. This segment has a portfolio of approximately 145,000 book titles and 2,700 journals. The company was formerly known as T&F Informa plc and changed its name to Informa plc in August 2005. Informa plc was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.

name: Hyve Group Plc
summary: Hyve Group Plc engages in the organization of trade exhibitions, conferences, and related activities. The company serves technology, beauty and healthcare, building and interior, education technology, energy, fashion, food and packaging, manufacturing industrial technology, retail, transport and logistic, travel and tourism, and other sectors. It operates in Asia, central Asia, Eastern and Southern Europe, Russia, the United Kingdom, and internationally. The company was formerly known as ITE Group plc and changed its name to Hyve Group Plc in September 2019. Hyve Group Plc was incorporated in 1985 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.

name: INSIGHT ENTERPR.  DL-,01

The company provides services including IT consulting, implementation, and managed services to businesses of all sizes. Insight partners with leading technology vendors to deliver solutions.

name: Intesa Sanpaolo S.p.A.

name: InflaRx N.V.
summary: InflaRx N.V., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, discovers and develops inhibitors using C5a technology primarily in the Germany and United States. Its C5a is an inflammatory mediator that is involved in the enhancement of a variety of autoimmune and other inflammatory diseases. The company's lead product candidate is IFX-1, an intravenously delivered first-in-class anti-C5a monoclonal antibody, which completed the Phase IIb clinical trial for the treatment of hidradenitis suppurativa, a rare and chronic debilitating systemic inflammatory skin disease; to treat ANCA-associated vasculitis, a rare and life-threatening autoimmune disease; and for the treatment of pyoderma gangrenosum, a chronic inflammatory skin disorder, as well as developing IFX-1 for the treatment of oncological diseases. It also develops IFX-2 that is in pre-clinical development stage for the treatment of chronic inflammation and autoimmune diseases. InflaRx N.V. has co-development agreement with Beijing Defengrei Biotechnology Co. Ltd. The company was formerly known as Fireman B.V. and changed its name to InflaRx N.V. in 2017. InflaRx N.V. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Jena, Germany.

name: INTL FLAVORS/FRAG.DL-,125
summary: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (IFF) is a global company that creates scents, tastes, and ingredients for various industries. Headquartered in New York City, IFF develops and manufactures flavors and fragrances for food, beverage, personal care, and household products. IFF serves customers worldwide.

name: INFINEON TECH.AG NA O.N.
summary: Infineon Technologies AG is a German semiconductor manufacturer headquartered in Neubiberg, Germany. The company designs, develops, manufactures, and markets a broad range of semiconductors and system solutions. Infineon's products are used in automotive, industrial, and security applications.

name: Infineon Technologies AG
summary: Infineon Technologies AG is a German semiconductor manufacturer. The company designs, develops, manufactures, and markets a broad range of semiconductors and system solutions. Infineon's products are used in automotive, industrial, and security applications.

name: 3i Group plc
summary: 3i Group plc is a British multinational private equity and venture capital company. It invests in mid-market companies across Europe and North America, focusing on sectors like business services, healthcare, and consumer goods. The company is headquartered in London, UK.

name: SBM Offshore N.V.
summary: SBM Offshore N.V. provides floating production solutions to the offshore energy industry worldwide. The company operates in two segments, Lease and Operate, and Turnkey. It engages in the design, supply, installation, operation, lease, life extension, and demobilization of floating production storage and offloading (FPSO) vessels, as well as semi-submersibles, tension leg platforms, liquefied natural gas (LNG) FPSOs, turret mooring systems, LNG regasification to power vessels, floating offshore wind and wave energy convertor systems, and brownfield and offshore loading terminals. The company also provides swivels, weathervaning systems, and mooring connectors for floating systems; after sales services; inspection, maintenance, and repair services; and emergency interventions and rapid response solutions. As of December 31, 2020, it operated a fleet of 14 FPSOs and 1 semi-submersible unit. The company was formerly known as IHC Caland and changed its name to SBM Offshore N.V. in 2005. SBM Offshore N.V. was founded in 1862 and is headquartered in Schiphol, the Netherlands.

name: II-VI INC.
summary: II-VI Incorporated (now Coherent Corp.) is a global manufacturer of engineered materials and optoelectronic components and devices. The company's products are used in a variety of applications, including industrial lasers, optical communications, and aerospace & defense. It is headquartered in Saxonburg, Pennsylvania.

name: ITV plc
summary: ITV plc, an integrated producer broadcaster, creates, owns, and distributes content on various platforms worldwide. It operates through Broadcast, and ITV Studios segments. The Broadcast segment broadcasts various contents on its family of free-to-air channels, including ITV, ITV2, ITV3, ITV4, ITVBe, ITV Encore, CITV, ITV Breakfast, CITV Breakfast, and various related +1 and HD equivalents; and offers television advertising services. It also delivers content through linear television broadcasting; ITV Hub, an over-the-top service on 28 platforms, including itv.com Website; and pay providers, such as Virgin and Sky, as well as through direct content deals with services comprising Amazon, Apple, and Netflix. In addition, this segment offers online advertising, HD digital channel on pay platform, and ITV Choice subscription services, as well as licenses DTT Multiplex A. The ITV Studios segment creates and produces programs and formats that include drama, entertainment, and factual entertainment for its own channels and other broadcasters, such as the BBC, Channel 4, Channel 5, and Sky. It also operates as an unscripted independent producer of content in the United States; and produces content for local broadcasters in Australia, Germany, France, Italy, the Netherlands, Sweden, Norway, Finland, and Denmark. In addition, this segment's distribution business licenses finished programs and formats, and third-party content internationally, as well as finances productions. The company also engages in the development of platform, broadband, transactional, and mobile services; operation of Freeview Multiplex A; rights ownership and distribution of television programs and films; and scheduling and commissioning of television programs. ITV plc was founded in 1955 is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.

name: ITM Power Plc
summary: ITM Power Plc designs, manufactures, and sells hydrogen energy systems for energy storage, transportation, and industrial sectors in the United Kingdom, Germany, France, Italy, the Netherlands, and the United States. It offers HGas for power-to-gas, clean fuel, and industrial hydrogen applications. The company is also involved in the research and development of scientific and engineering projects; development and manufacture of prototype products; and sale of electrolysis equipment and hydrogen storage solutions. In addition, it operates 15 hydrogen refueling stations. ITM Power Plc was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Sheffield, the United Kingdom.

name: Inchcape plc
summary: Inchcape plc operates as an automotive distributor and retailer. The company engages in the sale and distribution of new and used cars, and parts. It also provides aftersales service, body shop repairs, and parts sales; and finance and insurance products and services. The company operates in the Asia Pacific, the United Kingdom, rest of Europe, the Americas, and Africa. Inchcape plc was founded in 1847 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.

name: AURINIA PHARMACEUT.
summary: Aurinia Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapies to treat autoimmune diseases, with a focus on lupus nephritis. Their primary product is LUPKYNIS (voclosporin), a calcineurin inhibitor approved for the treatment of adult patients with active lupus nephritis in combination with a background immunosuppressive therapy regimen. The company is headquartered in Victoria, British Columbia, Canada.

name: CHINA SHENHUA EN. H  YC 1
summary: China Shenhua Energy Company Limited is a large-scale integrated energy company primarily engaged in the production and sale of coal and electricity in China. The company operates through segments including coal, power, railway, port, and shipping, forming a vertically integrated business model. China Shenhua Energy is headquartered in Beijing, China.

name: ICONIX BRAND GRP  DL-,001
summary: Iconix Brand Group, Inc. owns, licenses, and markets a portfolio of consumer brands across various categories including fashion, sports, and entertainment. The company generates revenue primarily through licensing agreements, allowing manufacturers and retailers to use its brands on their products. Iconix Brand Group is headquartered in New York, NY.

name: IMPACT Silver Corp.
summary: IMPACT Silver Corp. engages in the exploration, development, and mineral processing activities in Mexico. The company produces silver, lead, zinc, gold, and copper deposits. It operates San Ramon Deeps, Mirasol, and Cuchara-Oscar silver mines. The company also owns interests in the Royal Mines of Zacualpan Silver District and the Capire Mineral District covering 357 square kilometers located in central Mexico. IMPACT Silver Corp. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

name: PERMAN.TSB G.HLDG. EO-,50
summary: permanent tsb Group Holdings p.l.c. is an Irish financial services group providing retail and commercial banking services. The group operates through a network of branches and online channels, offering products such as mortgages, personal loans, and business banking solutions. permanent tsb is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland.

name: iliad S.A.
summary: iliad S.A. provides integrated fixed and mobile telecommunications services in France, Italy, Poland, and internationally. The company offers VoIP, IPTV, and flat-rate calling plans, as well as Freebox, a multiservice box on ADSL. As of December 31, 2020, it had 20 million subscribers in France and 7.2 million subscribers in Italy. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Paris, France.

name: Medios AG
summary: Medios AG is a pharmaceutical company based in Germany that specializes in compounding and supplying specialty pharmaceuticals. They focus on providing customized medications for patients with complex medical needs, primarily through partnerships with pharmacies. Medios AG is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.

name: ILL. TOOL WKS
summary: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (ITW) is a diversified manufacturing company that produces a wide range of industrial products and equipment. The company operates through various segments, including automotive, food equipment, test and measurement, and welding. ITW is headquartered in Glenview, Illinois, USA.

name: ILLUMINA INC.  DL-,01
summary: Illumina, Inc. is a biotechnology company that develops, manufactures, and markets integrated systems for genetic analysis. Their products and services are used in a wide range of applications, including genomic sequencing, genotyping, and gene expression analysis. Illumina is headquartered in San Diego, California, USA.

name: ILUKA RES
summary: Iluka Resources Limited is an Australian-based resources company specializing in the exploration, development, and production of mineral sands. The company's primary products include zircon and titanium dioxide feedstocks, which are used in a variety of industrial applications. Iluka Resources is headquartered in Perth, Western Australia.

name: IMI plc
summary: IMI plc, a specialist engineering company, designs, manufactures, and services engineered products worldwide. The company operates through three divisions: IMI Precision Engineering, IMI Critical Engineering, and IMI Hydronic Engineering. The IMI Precision Engineering division develops motion and fluid control technologies for industrial automation, commercial vehicle, life sciences, energy, and rail applications. This division offers actuators, air preparation products, pressure switches, and fittings; pneumatic, hydraulic, electric, and vacuum motion solutions; solenoid valves, angle-seat valves, motorized valves, NAMUR valves, and systems for dust filters; miniature fluid control solutions; precise and accurate syringes, syringe pumps, and rotary valves; and high-pressure control valves, nuclear valves, and pressure transmitters, as well as hydraulic solutions. It provides its products under the Norgren, Bimba, Buschjost, FAS, Herion, Kloehn, Maxseal, and Thompson Valves brands. The IMI Critical Engineering division offers flow control solutions, such as specialized valves and actuators to the fossil power, oil and gas, petrochemical, nuclear, marine, and pharmaceutical markets under the IMI Bopp & Reuther, IMI CCI, IMI Fluid Kinetics, IMI InterAtiva, IMI NH, IMI Orton, IMI PBM, IMI Remosa, IMI STI, IMI TH Jansen, IMI Truflo Marine, IMI Truflo Rona, IMI Truflo Italy IMI Z&J, and IMI Zikesch brands. The IMI Hydronic Engineering division provides products for hydronic distribution systems, which deliver heating and cooling systems to the residential and commercial building sectors. This segment offers balancing and control solutions, thermostatic control and pressurization systems, dirt and air separators, and pressure step degassers under the IMI Pneumatex, IMI TA, IMI Flow Design, IMI Heimeier, and IMI Aero-Dynamiek brands. The company was founded in 1862 and is headquartered in Birmingham, the United Kingdom.

name: IMMOFINANZ AG INH.
summary: Immofinanz AG is a commercial real estate company focused on office, retail, and logistics properties in Central and Eastern Europe. The company invests in and manages a portfolio of properties, generating revenue through rental income and property sales. Immofinanz is headquartered in Vienna, Austria.

name: AC Immune SA
summary: AC Immune SA, a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company, discovers, designs, and develops medicines and diagnostic products for the prevention and treatment of neurodegenerative diseases associated with protein misfolding. Its SupraAntigen and Morphomer platforms are designed to generate vaccines, antibodies, and small molecules, which selectively interact with misfolded proteins that are common in a range of neurodegenerative diseases. The company is developing Crenezumab, a humanized, conformation-specific monoclonal antibody, which is in Phase II clinical prevention trial for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease (AD). It is also developing ACI-24, an anti-Abeta vaccine candidate that is in Phase II clinical study for AD, as well as completed Phase Ib clinical study for Down syndrome; ACI-35, an anti-Tau vaccine candidate that has completed Phase Ib clinical study; and Tau- positron emission tomography (PET) imaging tracer, which is in Phase II clinical study. In addition, the company is researching and developing small molecule Tau aggregation inhibitors for AD and NeuroOrphan indications. Further, it has discovery and preclinical stage molecules targeting range of neurodegenerative diseases, which include diagnostics targeting TDP-43, alpha-synuclein, and NLRP3. The company has license agreements and collaborations with Genentech, Inc.; Biogen International GmbH; Janssen Pharmaceuticals, Inc.; Life Molecular Imaging SA; Eli Lilly and Company; and WuXi Biologics. AC Immune SA was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Lausanne, Switzerland.

name: ImmunoGen, Inc.
summary: Immunogen Inc. is a biotechnology company that develops targeted cancer therapeutics using its antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) technology. The company's pipeline includes product candidates for the treatment of various cancers. Immunogen is headquartered in Waltham, Massachusetts.

name: INDUS HOLDING AG
summary: INDUS HOLDING AG is a German-based investment holding company focused on acquiring and developing medium-sized industrial companies. The company invests in various sectors, including automotive, engineering, and construction. Indus Holding AG is headquartered in Bergisch Gladbach, Germany.

name: INTEL CORP.  DL-,001
summary: Intel Corporation is a multinational technology company that designs, manufactures, and sells integrated digital technology platforms. Their products include microprocessors, chipsets, and other computing components, which are used in various applications, including PCs, servers, and data centers. Intel is headquartered in Santa Clara, California.

name: ING GROEP NV  EO -,01
summary: ING Groep N.V. is a global financial institution offering banking, investments, life insurance and retirement services. The company provides services to retail, private, corporate and investment banking clients. ING is headquartered in Amsterdam, Netherlands.

name: ING GP NV SP.ADR/1 EO-,24

summary: Melia Hotels International is a Spanish hotel chain with a global presence, operating hotels under various brands including Melia, Gran Melia, Innside by Melia, and Paradisus. The company provides accommodation, dining, and event services to leisure and business travelers. Melia Hotels International is headquartered in Palma de Mallorca, Spain.

name: MERLIN PPTYS SOCIMI  EO 1
summary: MERLIN Properties SOCIMI SA is a Spanish real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on the acquisition and management of commercial properties. The company's portfolio includes office buildings, shopping centers, and logistics facilities. MERLIN Properties is headquartered in Madrid, Spain.

name: MITSUBISHI EST.
summary: Mitsubishi Estate Co., Ltd. is a Japanese real estate developer. They are involved in a wide range of real estate activities including office buildings, commercial facilities, residential properties and urban development. The company is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: MELEXIS NV
summary: Melexis NV designs, develops, manufactures and markets advanced mixed-signal semiconductors sensors and driver integrated circuits for automotive applications. The company's products include sensor ICs, driver ICs, and sensor interfaces. Melexis is headquartered in Tessenderlo, Belgium.

name: MEREDITH CORP.  DL 1
summary: Meredith Corporation (now Dotdash Meredith) is an American media company focused on publishing and broadcasting. They own various magazines, websites, and television stations. The company is headquartered in Des Moines, Iowa.

name: MagForce AG
summary: MagForce AG operates in the field of nanotechnology-based cancer treatment in Germany and Poland. It offers NanoTherm therapy for the treatment of solid tumors; NanoTherm, a ferrofluid liquid containing superparamagnetic iron oxide nano-particles that could be activated in an alternative magnetic field; NanoPlan, a therapy planning simulation software; and NanoActivator, a magnetic field applicator. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.

name: Mitsui Fudosan Co., Ltd.
summary: Mitsui Fudosan Co., Ltd. is a Japanese real estate company. They are involved in the development, leasing, and management of various properties, including office buildings, commercial facilities, and residential properties. The company is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group, Inc.
summary: Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group (MUFG) is a Japanese financial services company. They offer a wide range of banking, trust, securities, and other financial services to individuals and corporate clients globally. The company is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: METCASH LTD
summary: Metcash Limited is a wholesale distribution and marketing company specialising in grocery, liquor, hardware and other consumer goods. The company supplies independent retailers across Australia, New Zealand and South Africa. Metcash is based in Sydney, Australia.

name: MAGNA INTL INC.
summary: Magna International Inc. designs, develops, and manufactures automotive systems, components, and complete vehicles. The company provides a wide range of products, including body, chassis, exterior, seating, powertrain, active driver assistance systems, and complete vehicle engineering and assembly. Magna International is headquartered in Aurora, Ontario, Canada.

name: Australian Vintage Ltd
summary: Australian Vintage Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, produces, packages, markets, and distributes wine in Australia, the United Kingdom, Europe, Asia, North America, and internationally. The company operates through Australasia/North America Packaged, UK/Europe, Cellar Door, Australasia/North America Bulk Wine and Processing, and Vineyards segments. It offers wine under the Nepenthe, McGuigan Wines, and Tempus Two brands. The company also owns, operates, manages, and maintains vineyards; and provides packaged and bulk wines and grapes, as well as offers concentrate and winery processing services. Australian Vintage Ltd sells its products through retail, wholesale, and distributor channels, as well as through regional outlets and internet. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Cowandilla, Australia.

name: MGM RESORTS INTL  DL -,01
summary: MGM Resorts International is a global entertainment company that owns and operates casino resorts. Their resorts offer gaming, lodging, dining, entertainment, and retail experiences. The company is headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada.

name: Meggitt PLC
summary: Meggitt PLC designs and manufactures components and sub-systems in the United Kingdom, rest of Europe, the United States, and internationally. The company operates in four segments: Airframe Systems, Engine Systems, Energy & Equipment, and Services & Support. It offers ice protection products, radomes, and structures; air data and flight display products; brake control and tyre pressure monitoring systems, and wheels and brakes; engine health and vibration monitors, H2/O2 analyzers, and turbine monitoring and protection products; and aircraft cameras and security systems, and wireless aircraft systems. The company also provides ammunition handling, thermal, weapon scoring, and weapon training systems; energy storage, power conversion and distribution, and power generation systems; ducting systems, engine composites, and flow control valves; and fire protection and controls comprising bleed air leak detection products, cables and clamps, electronic control units, fire and overheat detection products, and fire suppression products. In addition, it offers ground fuelling, and fuel systems and tanks; motion control actuators, electric motor drives, and electric motors; oxygen and specialty restraint safety systems; and accelerometers, ceramics, fluid sensors, magnetic and current sensors, position and inertial sensors, pressure sensors, speed sensors, and temperature sensors. Further, the company provides polymer seals; heat exchangers, printed circuit heat exchangers, thermal components, and thermal management systems; and live fire and virtual trainers, as well as aftermarket services. It serves aerospace, defense, and energy and equipment markets. The company was formerly known as Meggitt Holdings Public Limited Company and changed its name to Meggitt PLC in April 1989. Meggitt PLC was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Coventry, the United Kingdom.

name: TOKIO MARINE HOLDINGS INC
summary: Tokio Marine Holdings, Inc. is a holding company for Tokio Marine Group, a global insurance group. The group provides a wide range of insurance products and services, including property and casualty insurance, life insurance, and reinsurance. The company is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: S+P GLOBAL INC.  DL 1
summary: S&P Global Inc. is a global provider of ratings, benchmarks, analytics, and data to the capital and commodity markets. The company provides independent credit ratings, indices, and other essential information. S&P Global is headquartered in New York, New York.

name: Mechel PAO
summary: Mechel PAO, together with its subsidiaries, engages in mining, steel, and power businesses in Russia, Asia, Europe, the Commonwealth of Independent States, the Middle East, the United States, and internationally. Its Mining segment produces and sells coking, metallurgical, and steam coal; coke; chemical products, including coal tar, coal benzene, and other compounds; and iron ore and iron ore concentrates. The company's Steel segment produces and sells semi-finished steel products, long steel products, and carbon and stainless flat products; ferrosilicon products; and pig iron, as well as metal products, including wire products, stampings and forgings, structural shapes, beams, and rails. Its Power segment generates and supplies electricity, heat energy, and other power resources to third parties. Mechel PAO also offers sea, rail, and motor transportation logistics services to third parties. The company was formerly known as Mechel OAO and changed its name to Mechel PAO in March 2016. Mechel PAO was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Moscow, Russia.

name: Mitsubishi Logistics Corporation
summary: Mitsubishi Logistics Corporation provides logistics and transportation services. Their services include warehousing, distribution, and international freight forwarding. The company is based in Tokyo, Japan.

name: MITSUBISHI EL. CORP.
summary: MITSUBISHI EL. CORP. is a Japanese multinational electronics and electrical equipment manufacturing company. It produces a wide range of products, including industrial automation systems, air conditioning systems, automotive equipment, and visual information systems. The company is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, and operates globally.

name: MICROSTRATEG.A NEW DL-001
summary: MICROSTRATEG.A NEW DL-001 is a provider of enterprise analytics software and services. The company's platform enables businesses to analyze data and make data-driven decisions. MicroStrategy is headquartered in Tysons Corner, Virginia.

name: Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Ltd.
summary: MITSUBISHI HEAVY is a Japanese multinational engineering, electrical equipment and electronics company headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. The company manufactures products including aerospace and defence systems, power systems, industrial machinery, and commercial vehicles. Mitsubishi Heavy Industries serves a wide range of industries globally.

name: MICHAELS COMPANIES INC.
summary: The Michaels Companies, Inc. is a North American arts and crafts specialty retailer. The company offers a wide assortment of arts, crafts, framing, floral, home décor, and seasonal merchandise to hobbyists and do-it-yourself enthusiasts. Headquartered in Irving, Texas, Michaels operates stores in the United States and Canada.

name: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group, Inc.
summary: SUMITOMO MITSUI TR.HLDGS is a financial services group that provides a range of banking, trust, and asset management services. The company operates primarily in Japan. Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Holdings is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: ANTARES PHA.  DL-,01
summary: ANTARES PHA. DL-,01 is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing self-injection products. They focus on therapies addressing unmet needs in urology and endocrinology. The company is headquartered in Ewing, New Jersey, USA.

name: Australian Mines Ltd.
summary: AUSTRALIAN MINES LTD. is an Australian mining company focused on the exploration and development of cobalt, nickel, and scandium projects. The company is developing the Sconi Project in Queensland, Australia. Australian Mines is headquartered in Perth, Australia.

name: MAKARA MINING CORP
summary: Makara Mining Corp., a mineral exploration company, focuses on the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold properties. It holds an option to acquire the Rude Creek Property and Idaho Creek Property located in the Yukon; and the Kenora Gold Property located in Northwestern Ontario. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

name: Mandarin Capital AG
summary: Mandarin Capital AG is a private equity firm that invests in small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in Europe and Asia. The firm focuses on companies in sectors such as manufacturing, consumer goods, and healthcare. Mandarin Capital is based in Frankfurt, Germany.

name: SEMICONDUCTOR MAN.INTL
summary: SEMICONDUCTOR MAN.INTL is a semiconductor foundry that manufactures integrated circuits for various customers. The company is one of the largest foundries in the world. Semiconductor Manufacturing International Corporation is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: CAPRI HOLDINGS LTD
summary: Capri Holdings Limited is a global fashion luxury group. They design, market, distribute and retail branded apparel, footwear, accessories and fragrance products. The company is headquartered in London, England.

name: MARKEL CORP.
summary: Markel Corporation is a financial holding company that markets and underwrites specialty insurance products. They also manage and invest capital for their insurance operations and pursue opportunities to acquire businesses outside of insurance. The company is headquartered in Richmond, Virginia.

name: MOBILE TELESYSTEMS ADR/2
summary: Mobile TeleSystems (MTS) is a leading telecommunications group in Russia and the CIS, providing a range of mobile and fixed-line voice, data, and digital services. It offers services to both residential and business customers, including mobile communications, broadband internet, pay-TV, and cloud services. The company is headquartered in Moscow, Russia.

name: MercadoLibre, Inc.
summary: MercadoLibre, Inc. operates online marketplaces dedicated to e-commerce and online auctions. The company enables businesses, individuals and institutions to list merchandise and conduct sales and purchases online. MercadoLibre is headquartered in Buenos Aires, Argentina.

name: MLP SE
summary: MLP SE is a German financial services company. It provides independent financial advice to private and corporate clients, focusing on wealth management, insurance, and real estate. MLP SE is headquartered in Wiesloch, Germany.

name: Manulife Financial Corporation
summary: Manulife Financial Corporation is a Canadian multinational insurance company and financial services provider. The company offers a wide range of financial products and services, including insurance, wealth management, and banking. Manulife is headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, Canada.

name: MediPharm Labs Corp.
summary: MediPharm Labs Corp., together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells pharmaceutical-grade cannabis oil and concentrates, and advance derivative products in Canada and Australia. It formulates, processes, packages, and distributes cannabis extracts and cannabinoid-based products. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Barrie, Canada.

name: MITSUI MNG SMELTG
summary: Mitsui Mining & Smelting Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based company engaged in the manufacture and sale of non-ferrous metals, chemicals, and electronic materials. The company's operations include zinc smelting, copper foil production, and the development of advanced materials, headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: 3M Company
summary: 3M Company is a diversified technology company with a global presence. It manufactures and markets a wide range of products and services in various sectors, including industrial, healthcare, consumer goods, and safety. The company is headquartered in St. Paul, Minnesota, USA.

name: Mitsubishi Motors Corporation
summary: Mitsubishi Motors Corporation is a Japanese multinational automotive manufacturer. The company develops, manufactures, and sells a range of vehicles, including passenger cars, SUVs, and commercial vehicles. The company is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: CHAMPION IRON
summary: Champion Iron Limited is an iron ore exploration and development company. The company is focused on developing its iron ore assets in the southern Labrador Trough in Quebec, Canada. The company is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.

name: METROPOLE TV INH. EO-,40
summary: Métropole Télévision S.A. (M6 Group) is a French media company. The company operates several television channels, radio stations, and digital platforms. The company is headquartered in Neuilly-sur-Seine, France.

name: MANTECH INTERN.CORP. A
summary: ManTech International Corporation provides technology solutions and services for U.S. federal government agencies. The company offers services in areas such as cybersecurity, data analytics, and enterprise IT. The company is headquartered in Herndon, Virginia, USA.

name: MEDICLINIC INTERN. LS-10
summary: Mediclinic International plc is a private hospital group with operations in Switzerland, Southern Africa (South Africa and Namibia) and the United Arab Emirates. The company provides a range of clinical services, including acute care, specialist services, and rehabilitation. The company is headquartered in Stellenbosch, South Africa.

name: MONSTER BEVER.NEW DL-,005
summary: Monster Beverage Corporation develops, markets, and distributes energy drink beverages and concentrates. The company offers a variety of energy drink brands. The company is headquartered in Corona, California, USA.

name: LVMH  EO 0,3
summary: LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton SE is a French multinational luxury goods conglomerate. The company manages a diverse portfolio of prestigious brands spanning fashion, leather goods, wines and spirits, perfumes and cosmetics, watches and jewelry, and selective retailing. LVMH is headquartered in Paris, France.

name: MorphoSys AG
summary: MorphoSys AG, together with its subsidiaries, discovers, develops and commercializes therapeutic antibodies for patients suffering from cancer and autoimmune diseases in the United States. Its lead product candidate is Tafasitamab, an antibody for the treatment of B cell malignancies, including diffuse large B cell lymphoma and chronic lymphocytic leukemia. The company develops Tremfya, an antibody to treat plaque psoriasis, psoriatic arthritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, hidradenitis suppurativa, and adenomatous polyposis diseases; Gantenerumab, an antibody for the treatment of Alzheimer's diseases through its pharmaceutical partners; Otilimab, an antibody for rheumatoid arthritis; and MOR106, an antibody for atopic dermatitis. It also develops Felzartamab, an antibody directed against CD38, which is in Phase I/II clinical trials for the treatment of anti-PLA2R-positive membranous nephropathy, an autoimmune disease. MorphoSys AG has a regional licensing agreement with I-Mab Biopharma to develop and commercialize felzartamab in China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau; a strategic alliance with the LEO Pharma; a joint collaboration and license agreement with Incyte Corporation for the development and commercialization of MorphoSys investigational compound tafasitamab (MOR208); and a clinical collaboration with Incyte Corporation and Xencor, Inc. to investigate the combination of tafasitamab, plamotamab, and lenalidomide in patients with relapsed or refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma, and relapsed or refractory follicular lymphoma. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Planegg, Germany.

name: ORANGE BELGIUM S.A.
summary: Orange Belgium S.A. is a telecommunications operator in Belgium. It provides mobile and fixed telephony, broadband internet, and television services to residential and business customers. The company is headquartered in Brussels, Belgium.

name: Moncler S.p.A.
summary: Moncler S.p.A., together with its subsidiaries, designs, produces, and distributes clothing and related accessories for men, women, and children under the Moncler brand name. Its product portfolio includes footwear products; leather goods, such as bags, backpacks, and accessories; and sunglasses, eyeglasses, frames, and men's and women's ski goggles under the Moncler Lunettes brand. As of December 31, 2020, the company operated 219 retail directly operated stores and 63 wholesale shop-in-shops. The company also sells its products through moncler.com, an online store. It serves in Italy, other European countries, Japan, the rest of Asia, and the Americas. The company was formerly known as Moncler S.r.l. and changed its name to Moncler S.p.A. in October 2013. Moncler S.p.A. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Milan, Italy.

name: MPC Container Ships ASA
summary: MPC Container Ships ASA is a container shipping company owning and operating a fleet of container vessels. The company is headquartered in Hamburg, Germany.

name: Tellurian Inc.
summary: Tellurian Inc. engages in the natural gas business worldwide. The company is developing a portfolio of natural gas production, liquefied natural gas (LNG) marketing, and infrastructure assets that includes an approximately 27.6 million tonnes per annum LNG terminal facility and an associated pipeline in southwest Louisiana. It owns interests in 9,373 net acres of natural gas production assets, and 72 producing wells located in the Haynesville Shale trend of northern Louisiana. The company was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Houston, Texas.

name: Marathon Petroleum Corporation
summary: Marathon Petroleum Corporation is an integrated downstream energy company that operates through refining, marketing, and transportation segments. The company refines crude oil and other feedstocks, markets refined products through retail and wholesale channels, and transports crude oil and refined products via pipelines, barges, and trucks. Marathon Petroleum is headquartered in Findlay, Ohio.

name: MAG Silver Corp.
summary: MAG Silver Corp. engages in the exploration and development of silver mining properties. It also explores for gold, lead, and zinc deposits. It primarily holds 44% interest in the Juanicipio project located in the Fresnillo District, Zacatecas State, Mexico. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.

name: MEDUSA MINING LTD
summary: Medusa Mining Limited is an Australian-based gold producer engaged in gold mining, exploration and development activities, primarily focused on the Philippines. The company's primary asset is the Co-O gold mine in the Philippines, where it extracts and processes gold ore. Medusa Mining is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.

name: MTR Corporation Ltd.
summary: MTR Corporation Limited operates and invests in railway systems in Hong Kong and internationally. The company engages in railway and bus operations, property development, property leasing and management, and other businesses such as telecommunications and international consultancy. MTR Corporation is headquartered in Hong Kong.

name: MERCK KGAA O.N.
summary: Merck KGaA is a science and technology company. The company operates in healthcare, life science, and electronics sectors. Merck KGaA is based in Germany.

name: MOSENERGO ADR/50  RL 1
summary: Mosenergo PJSC is one of the largest territorial generation companies in Russia, producing electricity and heat. The company operates power plants and supplies energy to consumers in the Moscow region. Mosenergo is headquartered in Moscow, Russia.

name: SUPER MICRO COMPUT.DL-,01
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. develops and manufactures high-performance server and storage solutions based on modular and open architecture. The company offers a range of server management software and optimizes its products for various workloads, including AI, cloud, and 5G. Super Micro Computer is headquartered in San Jose, California.

name: MADISON SQUARE GAR.SP. A
summary: Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp. is a live entertainment and media company. The company's assets include venues like Madison Square Garden and Radio City Music Hall, sports teams like the New York Knicks and New York Rangers, and entertainment productions. Madison Square Garden Entertainment is headquartered in New York, New York.

name: MS Industrie AG
summary: MS Industrie AG is a German industrial holding company that focuses on the automotive, powertrain technology, and other industrial sectors. The company provides a range of products and services, including drive systems, high-precision components, and industrial services, with headquarters in Munich, Germany. MS Industrie AG aims to deliver technologically advanced solutions and sustainable growth within its key markets.

name: Microsoft Corporation
summary: Microsoft Corporation develops, licenses, and supports software, services, devices, and solutions worldwide. Its Productivity and Business Processes segment offers Office, Exchange, SharePoint, Microsoft Teams, Office 365 Security and Compliance, and Skype for Business, as well as related Client Access Licenses (CAL); Skype, Outlook.com, OneDrive, and LinkedIn; and Dynamics 365, a set of cloud-based and on-premises business solutions for small and medium businesses, large organizations, and divisions of enterprises. Its Intelligent Cloud segment licenses SQL and Windows Servers, Visual Studio, System Center, and related CALs; GitHub that provides a collaboration platform and code hosting service for developers; and Azure, a cloud platform. It also offers support services and Microsoft consulting services to assist customers in developing, deploying, and managing Microsoft server and desktop solutions; and training and certification to developers and IT professionals on various Microsoft products. Its More Personal Computing segment provides Windows original equipment manufacturer (OEM) licensing and other non-volume licensing of the Windows operating system; Windows Commercial, such as volume licensing of the Windows operating system, Windows cloud services, and other Windows commercial offerings; patent licensing; Windows Internet of Things; and MSN advertising. It also offers Surface, PC accessories, PCs, tablets, gaming and entertainment consoles, and other devices; Gaming, including Xbox hardware, and Xbox content and services; video games and third-party video game royalties; and Search, including Bing and Microsoft advertising. It sells its products through OEMs, distributors, and resellers; and directly through digital marketplaces, online stores, and retail stores. It has a strategic collaboration with DXC Technology and Dynatrace, Inc.; and a partnership with WPP plc. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Redmond, Washington.

name: MITSUI CHEMICALS
summary: Mitsui Chemicals, Inc. is a Japanese chemical company that manufactures and sells a wide range of chemical products. The company's products include basic chemicals, performance polymers, functional chemicals, and healthcare materials. Mitsui Chemicals is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: Marsh & McLennan Companies, Inc.
summary: Marsh & McLennan Companies, Inc. is a global professional services firm providing advice and solutions in the areas of risk, strategy, and people. Through its brands Marsh, Guy Carpenter, Mercer, and Oliver Wyman, the company helps clients navigate an increasingly dynamic and complex environment. Headquartered in New York, NY, Marsh & McLennan serves clients in over 130 countries.

name: MASCO CORP.  DL 1
summary: Masco Corporation designs, manufactures, and distributes home improvement and building products. The company's product lines include decorative architectural products (paints and coatings), plumbing products (faucets, showerheads), and cabinet products. Masco is headquartered in Livonia, Michigan, and serves both the professional and consumer markets.

name: Metsa Board Oyj Class B
summary: Metsä Board Oyj is a Finnish company that produces paperboards, including folding boxboard, white kraftliner, and food service boards. The company provides sustainable and lightweight paperboard solutions for consumer goods, retail-ready packaging, and food service applications. Metsä Board is headquartered in Espoo, Finland.

name: WAERTSILAE
summary: Wärtsilä is a Finnish company that manufactures and services power sources and other equipment for the marine and energy markets. Their products include large internal combustion engines, ship machinery, automation, and electrical systems, with headquarters located in Helsinki, Finland. Wärtsilä also provides services such as maintenance, upgrades, and digital solutions to its customers worldwide.

name: MICRON TECHN. INC. DL-,10
summary: Micron Technology is a global semiconductor company that produces memory and storage solutions. They manufacture DRAM, NAND, and NOR flash memory, as well as solid-state drives (SSDs) and memory modules for use in computers, mobile devices, and other electronic products, with headquarters in Boise, Idaho. Micron serves a wide range of industries, including data centers, consumer electronics, and automotive.

name: Motorola Solutions, Inc.
summary: Motorola Solutions provides mission-critical communications, video security & access control and command center software. The company serves government and enterprise customers and its headquarters are located in Chicago, Illinois, USA. Their offerings include two-way radios, dispatch consoles, body-worn cameras, and video analytics.

name: Mitsui & Co., Ltd.
summary: Mitsui & Co., Ltd. is a Japanese general trading company (sogo shosha) engaged in a wide range of businesses, including energy, chemicals, machinery, metals, food, and textiles. The company facilitates trade and investment globally, developing projects and providing financial services, with headquarters in Tokyo, Japan. Mitsui operates through numerous subsidiaries and affiliated companies worldwide.

name: MATTEL INC.  DL 1
summary: Mattel, Inc. is a global toy company that designs, manufactures, and markets a wide range of toy products. Their portfolio includes iconic brands such as Barbie, Hot Wheels, Fisher-Price, and Thomas & Friends, with headquarters in El Segundo, California. Mattel distributes its products through various retail channels worldwide.

name: MTU Aero Engines AG
summary: MTU Aero Engines is a German aircraft engine manufacturer that develops, produces, and services engines for commercial and military aircraft, as well as industrial gas turbines. The company is headquartered in Munich, Germany and provides maintenance, repair, and overhaul services for aircraft engines. MTU Aero Engines partners with major engine manufacturers like Pratt & Whitney and General Electric.

name: MITSUI E+S HLDGS CO. LTD.
summary: Mitsui E+S Holdings Co., Ltd. is a Japanese company involved in the manufacturing of machinery, engines, and steel structures. They operate through various segments including energy solutions, social infrastructure, and marine machinery and systems. The company is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

name: MUEHLBAUER HOLD.AG O.N.
summary: Muehlbauer Holding AG is a German company specializing in the development, manufacturing, and sales of production equipment for the smart card, RFID, and solar industries. The company's portfolio includes machines for chip embedding, card personalization, and solar cell production, with headquarters located in Roding, Germany. Muehlbauer provides solutions to customers worldwide, including government agencies, card manufacturers, and solar panel producers.

name: MANCHESTER UTD (NEW) A
summary: Manchester United is a professional football club based in Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, England. It is one of the most valuable and widely supported football clubs in the world, known for its success in the English Premier League and European competitions. The club generates revenue through broadcasting rights, merchandising, ticket sales, and sponsorship deals.

name: Marui Group Co., Ltd.
summary: MARUI GROUP CO. LTD. is a Japanese retail company primarily operating department stores and offering financial services. Headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, Marui is known for its focus on fashion and lifestyle goods and also has credit card and other financial service offerings.

name: MITSUBISHI MAT.
summary: Mitsubishi Materials Corporation is a Japanese company engaged in the manufacturing and sale of cement, metals, and advanced materials. The company operates through numerous subsidiaries and partnerships worldwide.

name: Murphy Oil Corporation
summary: Murphy Oil Corporation is an independent exploration and production company with a global portfolio of crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids. The company explores for and produces oil and gas in the United States, Canada, and other international locations, with headquarters in El Dorado, Arkansas. Murphy Oil focuses on both onshore and offshore operations.

name: MURATA MFG
summary: Murata Manufacturing Co., Ltd. is a Japanese manufacturer of electronic components, primarily ceramic passive components. The company’s products include capacitors, resistors, inductors, and sensors used in a variety of applications. Murata is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.

name: MUENCH.RUECKVERS.VNA O.N.
summary: Munich Re is a reinsurance company, providing insurance coverage to other insurance companies. They operate globally, offering solutions for risk management, primary insurance, and insurance-related risk. The company is headquartered in Munich, Germany.

name: MUTARES KGAA  NA O.N.
summary: Mutares SE & Co. KGaA is a German private equity firm that acquires and restructures companies in special situations. They focus on companies with operational improvement potential. The company is headquartered in Munich, Germany.

name: Mincor Resources NL
summary: Mincor Resources NL engages in the exploration, development, and mining of mineral resources in Australia. The company explores for nickel, gold, and copper deposits. Its flagship project is the Cassini Nickel project located in the Southern Goldfields region of Western Australia. The company was formerly known as Africwest Gold NL and changed its name to Mincor Resources NL in October 1999. Mincor Resources NL was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in West Perth, Australia.

name: MOVADO GRP INC.  DL-,01

The US Regulated segments owns and operates transmission facilities across upstate New York, Massachusetts, New Hampshire, Rhode Island, and Vermont; and electricity distribution networks in upstate New York, Massachusetts, and Rhode Island. Its assets comprise 14,659 kilometres of overhead lines, 169 kilometres of underground cables, and 396 transmission substations; an electricity distribution network of approximately 117,488 circuit kilometres and 730 distribution substations; a network of approximately 57,425 kilometres of gas pipeline; and approximately 801 kilometres of gas transmission pipes. name: NOV Inc.
